  • Destroyed and replaced with countless new Realities. (Chapter 4: Season OG)[1]

September 12th 2017

Overview

 BR Maps | Apollo
Asteria | C4SOG | Helios
This article is about a map that has been removed from Battle Royale.
This article is about a map that has been removed from Battle Royale.
This page may contain speculation and/or fan interpretations.
Due to the lack of official information, some info on this page may therefore be partially incorrect.

The Chapter 1 Island, also known under the code-name Athena (which is also the code-name for the Fortnite: Battle Royale mode) is the Island used in Chapter 1 (Pre-Season - Season X), Chapter 4: Season OG, and Fortnite OG. It had about 13 variations throughout Chapter 1. It was reorganized to create Apollo and Artemis, which were subsequently reforged with parts of other realities to create Asteria.

Athena became playable again during Chapter 4: Season OG, but the island was slightly altered.

Athena became playable once again in Fortnite OG, a game-mode introduced during Chapter 6: Season 1. The island is also slightly altered, similarly to Chapter 4: Season OG.

Storyline

Storyline[]

Athena is the name of the Fortnite: Battle Royale map that was used in the entirety of Chapter 1. It was held together by the Zero Point, a powerful orb of energy that was used to maintain the island. Many forces had sought to destroy The Zero Point which, if successful, would result in the destruction the island. This included Kevin the Cube, The Devourer, and more. The Zero Point was contained in a structure called The Vault, which was directly underneath a location called Loot Lake. The Vault also contained several items which had previously been removed. During The Unvaulting, players managed to access The Vault and could choose a single weapon to “unvault”.

While The Unvaulting was taking place, a character known as The Prisoner took the opportunity to strike the island with a volcanic eruption. This eruption destroyed two locations (Retail Row & Tilted Towers) and awakened The Devourer from its slumber beneath Polar Peak.

As The Devourer was now on the loose, the Imagined Order was forced to leave The Vault and take over Pressure Plant. From there, they created the Mecha, which was to be used to defend the island from the Devourer. After weeks of preparation, Singularity’s Mecha was ready. In the event known as The Final Showdown, The Mecha and the Devourer fought. Eventually, the Mecha had won, but in the aftermath of the battle, the Zero Point was fully exposed.

After the Zero Point's explosion caused a pause in time which also brought along a paused Meteor in the sky, the character known as The Scientist built Rift Zones and The Rocket to re-contain The Zero Point along with 6 other rockets, causing a Black Hole which sucked up all of Athena.

In Chapter 4: Season OG, Jones using the Time Machine travels back to an alternative 2018's Athena with multiple altered season events. During The Big Bang, the Rocket (with an attached time machine with it) played out the events of The End, which ultimately led to the Island suffering the same fate.

Athena lasted a total of 761 (790 if counted Chapter 4: Season OG) days before The Zero Point reorganized it into the new islands (Apollo & Artemis) during The End.

In Chapter 6: Season 1, Athena returned completely intact in Fortnite OG. The events would play out mostly the same with some slight changes (e.g. The Cube being red) and small "alterations" to the map.

History

History[]

  • OG
  • C4SOG

Update v33.00[]

December 6th 2024

  • Re-introduced the Athena island featuring the 13 locations from Season 1, which includes:
    • Pleasant Park
    • Loot Lake
    • Dusty Depot
    • Salty Springs
    • Moisty Mire
    • Retail Row
    • Fatal Fields
    • Anarchy Acres
    • Wailing Woods
    • Lonely Lodge
    • Greasy Grove
    • Tomato Town
    • Flush Factory
  • Re-introduced the original Unnamed Locations, which include:
    • Risky Farm
    • Factory
    • Truckasaurus
    • Pleasant Manor
    • Race Track
    • RV Park
    • Anarchy Bridge
    • Lucky Bridge
    • Green Steel Bridge (Chapter 1)
    • Orange Steel Bridge
    • Northern Houses
    • Stretched Mountain
    • Dusty Mountain
    • Stunt Mountain
    • Flush Mountain
    • Giant Chair
    • Tree of Life
    • Tomato Tunnel
    • Bear
    • Container Yard
    • Precarious Flatbed
    • Encircled Tree
    • Fort House
    • Prison
    • Crashed Battle Bus
    • Circle of Hedges
    • Truck Coast
  • For some reason, an elevated hut on a hill near Retail Row is missing.
  • For some reason, the elevated hut on Dusty Mountain is wrong.
  • For some reason, the Tree of Life is in the wrong position.

Update v33.30[]

January 31st 2025

  • Re-introduced the 5 locations from Season 2, which include:
    • Tilted Towers
    • Shifty Shafts
    • Snobby Shores
    • Haunted Hills
    • Junk Junction
  • Re-introduced the Unnamed Locations from Season 2, which include:
    • Convenience Store
    • Starry Suburbs Ruins
    • Sports Center
    • Motel
    • Umbrella Mine
    • Metal Llama
    • Yonder Yard
    • Outskirts
    • Blurry Billboards
  • Added new biomes:
    • Boreal Forest
    • Northern Houses
    • Forest
    • Swamp
  • Giant Chair is now bigger.
  • Tomato Tunnel now includes an emergency staircase.
  • Added some more huts around the Island.
  • Pleasant Manor was updated.
  • The elevated hut on a hill near Retail Row was added.

Update v34.20[]

March 25th 2025

  • Re-introduced the 1 location from Season 3, which includes:
    • Lucky Landing
  • Dancefloors were added in 3 points on the Island:
    • Pleasant Manor
    • Flush Factory
    • RV Park
  • Wooden Crab was added on a hill near Moisty Mire.
  • Brick Fox was added on a hill near Wailing Woods.
  • Lucky Bridge was re-designed to fit the theme of the newly added Lucky Landing.
    • Lucky Temple was added alongside Lucky Landing.
  • The elevated hut on Dusty Mountain is now correct.

Update v35.00[]

May 2nd 2025

  • The Meteor has appeared in the sky of the island.
    • It gets closer to the island as time passes
  • Telescope camps appeared around the island, looking towards the meteor.

Update v35.10[]

May 16th 2025

  • A small camp appeared on a building in Tilted Towers with signs with a UFO drawing and text that read "Today Tomorrow".
  • Televisions around the island began broadcasting a test-pattern graphic of a Llama and unintelligible audio.
    • The TV broadcast contains morse code that says "It is happening ag..."

Update v35.20[]

May 30th 2025

  • Meteorites began falling from the sky during matches.
    • The amount of meteorites would increase as the match progressed.

Update v36.00[]

June 7th 2025

  • The meteor has crashed into Dusty Depot scattering rubble over the area, partially destroying the location and creating a crater, where a research facility was built around the meteor to find out what is inside it, creating Dusty Divot.
  • A drive-in theater known as Risky Reels was built, it was also damaged by a meteorite.
  • A mansion was built southeast of Lonely Lodge with a secret underground area and a open side that led into a cliff, which served as the Heroes' base.
    • An erratic array of wooden and brick stairs can be found on the cliffside, referencing a Ninja lowlight from the original Season 4.
  • Loot Lake has been hit with rubble from the impact of the meteor in Dusty Depot.
  • A Villain Lair with a Rocket and a Launch pad was added on top of a mountain east of Snobby Shores.
  • A meteorite crashed into the office building at Tilted Towers, destroying the building.
  • A meteorite has crashed into the Prison, destroying the middle area.
  • A movie set was added into Moisty Mire.
  • The depot building at Yonder Yard has been replaced with a dance club.
  • Wooden ramps have appeared on Stunt Mountain.
  • A Movie Set was added east of Junk Junction, replacing 2 houses.
  • A secret underground base was added underneath the blue house in Salty Springs.
  • A meteorite has crashed into the Motel, nearly destroying the sign and creating a crater.
    • More meteorites have crashed into the Island, all of them have a convoy of cars and trucks around them.
  • All 3 dancefloors added in previous season got removed.
  • For some reason, the brick hut to the northwest of Loot Lake is missing.

June 14th 2025

  • A Fork Knife Food Truck has appeared in Retail Row.

Update v36.10[]

June 18th 2025

  • The central building at Dusty Divot was covered.
  • A Mysterious Hatch has appeared in Wailing Woods.
    • The bunker contains morse code through blinking lights that translates to "Something is wrong"
  • The crater at Tilted Towers has been patched up. A dump truck is clearing the debris and remains of furniture in the destroyed area.
  • A Hop Rock convoy has appeared in Tilted Towers.
    • It was mistakenly present in both Tilted Towers and Sports Center for some time.
  • The excavation of the meteor in Dusty Divot is halfway done. A metallic object can be seen through certain areas of the meteor.
  • Trees and grass have started growing in Dusty Divot.
  • A campsite not present in Season 4 has appeared on top of Dusty Mountain.

June 21st 2025

  • The crater in Risky Reels is being patched up.
  • The Tilted Towers Hop Rock convoy has reached the Sports Center and is heading to the Villain Lair.
    • It previously was accidentally present in both Tilted Towers and Sports Center for some time.
Tilted Convoy - In Tilted
Tilted Convoy - In Sports Center

June 24th 2025

  • Omega and Carbide posters have appeared on the Island.

Update v36.20[]

July 15th 2025

  • The Dusty Divot meteor excavation is complete, and an empty space pod was found at the center of the meteor. The research facility is being abandoned and trees and grass keep growing inside the crater.
  • The Hop rock convoy from Tilted Towers is now approaching Snobby Shores.
  • Hop Rocks and meteorite fragments appeared inside of the Villain Lair.
  • The crater in Risky Reels was completely patched up.
  • Heavy equipment started tearing down the remains of the destroyed building at Tilted Towers.
  • The Hop rock convoy from Risky Reels is now passing through Anarchy Acres.
  • The crater near Fatal Fields is being patched up, the convoy is being escorted west across Orange Steel Bridge.
  • The Fork Knife Food Truck has left Retail Row and appeared in Greasy Grove.
  • The Prison crater is being patched up, the convoy is starting to leave the location.
Risky Convoy - In Anarchy
Tilted Convoy - In Snobby
Fatal Convoy - On Orange Bridge
Prison Convoy - Prison

July 23rd 2025

  • The Rocket in the Villain Lair has been fully upgraded.
  • A 3-day countdown has appeared in TVs around the Island as well as in the control panel by the Rocket.
  • A klaxon can be heard coming from the Villain Lair, ringing every hour.
Countdown
Wrong texture when the countdown reached 0:00:00

Blast Off

  • The countdown has expired and the Rocket has launched, flying around the Island until eventually it boosted into the sky and disappeared after creating a red Crack in the Sky. The Rocket's thruster fell into Anarchy Acres.
  • Following the Rocket launch, a rift has appeared in Lonely Lodge.
  • The Crack in the Sky began growing.
Stage 1
Stage 2

July 27th 2025

  • The sign in Lonely Lodge was rifted away.
  • A rift started forming around the Motel sign.
  • New part of The Crack in the Sky has opened above the mountain near Greasy Grove.
Stage 3

July 28th 2025

  • The part of The Crack in the Sky above the mountain near Greasy Grove has expanded.
Stage 4

Update v36.30[]

July 29th 2025

  • A detective agency was added to Retail Row.
  • The Fork Knife Food Truck has left Greasy Grove.
  • The crater southeast of Retail Row has been patched up. The convoy is south of Retail Row.
  • The Prison convoy is on their way through Fatal Fields.
    • The convoy is also still present near the staring position for an unknown reason.
  • The crater near Fatal Fields has been patched up, the convoy is on their way to Greasy Grove.
    • The convoy is also still present on Orange Steel Bridge for an unknown reason.
  • Cars and equipment have left Dusty Divot, leaving the research facility deserted. Trees and grass continue to grow, and very few Hop Rocks are left.
  • The crater near Starry Suburbs Ruins has been patched, the convoy is between Junk Junction and Haunted Hills.
  • The convoy from Risky Reels is east of Pleasant Park.
Risky Convoy - Near Pleasant
Starry Convoy - Near Haunted
Race Convoy - Near Retail
Prison Convoy - In Fatal
Fatal Convoy - Near Greasy
  • A new building is under construction on the patched up crater in Tilted Towers.
  • The Motel sign was rifted away.
    • It can be found in Venture in Fortnite: Reload
  • A rift started forming around the rotating Tomato Head in Tomato Town.
  • A new part of The Crack in the Sky is starting to form above Anarchy Acres.
Stage 5

July 30th 2025

  • The part of The Crack in the Sky above Anarchy Acres has expanded.
  • The rotating Tomato Head was rifted away.
    • It can be found on Oninoshima.
  • A rift started forming around the NOMS sign in Retail Row.
Stage 6

July 31st 2025

  • The NOMS sign was rifted away.
  • A rift started forming around the Durrr Burger head in Greasy Grove.

August 1st 2025

  • The Durrr Burger head was rifted away.
    • It can be found on Venture in Blitz Royale.
  • A rift started forming on the mountain northwest of Greasy Grove.

August 3rd 2025

  • An anchor rifted in on the mountain northwest of Greasy Grove.
  • A rift started forming on a hill north of Moisty Mire.
  • The Crack in the Sky has extended towards Moisty Mire.
Stage 7

August 4th 2025

  • A carriage rifted in on a hill north of Moisty Mire.
  • A rift started forming on one of the Moisty Mire islands.
  • The Crack in the Sky has expanded.
Stage 8

August 5th 2025

  • A skeleton rifted in on one of the Moisty Mire islands.
  • New part of The Crack in the Sky has opened above the Race Track.
Stage 9

August 6th 2025

  • The part of The Crack in the Sky above the Race Track has expanded.
  • Sand and snow are now coming out of The Crack in the Sky.
Stage 10

Update v37.00[]

August 7th 2025

  • Moisty Mire was replaced by the Desert, bringing in a new city with it, Paradise Palms, located at the place of the Stagecoach originally rifted into Moisty Mire.
    • For an unknown reason, Paradise Palms uses the Season X sign instead of the Season 5 sign.
  • Slurp Cacti can be found in the desert biome.
  • Added new Unnamed Locations:
    • Dino Park
    • Junkyard
    • Pueblo
    • The Burger
    • Cacti Forest
    • Trucker's Oasis
    • The Birthplace
    • Roadside Diner
    • Calamity's Residence
  • Prison, Convenience Store, Circle of Hedges, Wooden Crab, and Truck Coast were removed along with Moisty Mire.
  • The Race Track southeast of Retail Row was revamped with a proper concrete race track.
  • A fancy golf club named Lazy Links was rifted onto the Island, replacing Anarchy Acres.
  • The abandoned Dusty Divot was overgrown with grass, trees and small ponds.
  • Viking Village was rifted to the summit of a mountain near Greasy Grove.
  • Brick Fox was removed.
  • Missing NOMS sign appeared north east of Risky Reels.
  • The missing Durrr Burger head from Greasy Grove's Durrr Burger Restaurant got rifted back in. It can be found on a hill east of Pleasant Park.
  • The Crack in the Sky is starting to fade away.
  • Goodbye signs were put out on the roof and the parking lot of the Pizza Pit in Tomato Town.
    • Similar signs can be found on the roof and sidewalk of the Durrr Burger in Greasy Grove.
  • 7 Moai Heads were added around the Island.
  • Most of the movie sets were removed.
  • The drive-in section has been lined up with cars. Flipped cars and destroyed houses' roofs were fixed.
  • A tombstone was added east of Paradise Palms to pay homage to the "greatest rescue mission in Fortnite[2]".
    • This time an erratic array of wooden and brick stairs can be found above it, referencing the failed rescue attempt.
  • Ramps were added in many places around the Island.
  • The rest of the Meteor Craters have been patched up.
  • The rest of the Hop Rock Convoys have disappeared.
  • A Wooden Wolf can be found on a hill by Greasy Grove.
  • A "MOON" sign appeared in Retail Row, replacing the missing NOMS sign.
  • Some stage lights and a speaker were added inside of the Northern Factory in Loot Lake.
  • Wooden and brick stairway behind Hero Mansion was removed.
  • Speakers inside of the Club in Yonder Yard are now different colors.
  • The Crashed Battle Bus has changed design and now has a proper deflated balloon prop.
  • The truck by the new building in Tilted Towers changed its position.
  • The Fork Knife Food Truck can now be found in Paradise Palms.
  • Lucky Temple was accidentally rotated.

August 15th 2025

  • Trucks have appeared between Salty Springs and Dusty Divot.
  • The Crack in the Sky has faded away even more.

August 23rd 2025

  • The Crack in the Sky has faded away even more.

Update v37.10[]

August 26th 2025

  • The truck by the new building in Tilted Towers changed its position once again.
  • The Crack in the Sky has faded away even more.
  • The Risky Reels screen was fixed
  • The sign outside of Paradise Palms was fixed and displays the correct texture.
  • The trucks have moved to the western side of Dusty Divot.
  • The Durrr Burger head has disappeared from its hill east of Pleasant Park.

4:00 PM ET

  • The Durrr Burger head has reappeared on its hill east of Pleasant Park.

August 28th 2025

  • The Crack in the Sky began spitting out dark mist.

August 30th 2025

  • The Crack in the Sky started sending lightning strikes to a mountain east of Fatal Fields, destroying each cacti in a formation. Strikes got stronger and lasted longer with time.
  • The Crack in the Sky became smaller with each strike.

Crack Closure

  • After the last cacti was destroyed, the crack closed and a mysterious red cube appeared.

September 1st 2025

  • Revin the Cube started rolling, starting a 27 day-long journey.
    • It rolls roughly every 1 hour and 43 minutes.

September 3rd 2025

  • A small stone tomato head statue appeared on top of Uncle Pete's Pizza Pit in Tomato Town.
  • An old pickup truck appeared in Paradise Palms.
  • The construction of the new building in Tilted Towers resumes.

September 4th 2025

  • Revin the Cube crushed a hut.

Later that day

  • Revin the Cube stopped near Fatal Fields and created a high-speed dome around itself.
The Cube imprinting the first rune

September 5th 2025

  • Revin the Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.
    • It now rolls every 62 minutes and 30 seconds[3].

September 8th 2025

  • Revin the Cube stopped near Greasy Grove and created a high-speed dome around itself.
The Cube imprinting the second rune

September 9th 2025

  • Revin the Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.
    • It now rolls every 37 minutes and 30 seconds[4].

Update v37.20[]

September 10th 2025

  • Tomato Town was replaced by Tomato Temple.
  • The trucks have moved to the northwestern side of Dusty Divot.
  • The construction of the new building in Tilted Towers resumes.
  • The Motel sign was rifted back in. It is completly intact, unlike in original Season 5.
  • Gas Station in Paradise Palms was replaced by the one seen in the lobby background for original Season 5.

September 11th 2025

  • Revin the Cube stopped near Salty Springs and created a high-speed dome around itself.

September 12th 2025

  • Revin the Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.
    • It now rolls every 53 minutes.

September 14th 2025

  • Revin the Cube stopped near Retail Row and created a high-speed dome around itself.
The Cube imprinting the fourth rune

September 15th 2025

  • Revin the Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.
    • It now rolls every 39 minutes.

September 17th 2025

  • Revin the Cube stopped in Wailing Woods and created a high-speed dome around itself.
The Cube imprinting the fifth rune

September 18th 2025

  • Revin the Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.

Update v37.30[]

September 18th 2025

  • Dusty Diner was opened in the remains of Dusty Depot.
  • The building in Tilted Towers that the meteor destroyed is now fully constructed and is now an outdoor store with a thrift shop in the basement.
  • The moon at night is now red.
  • Lights coming out of the Mysterious Hatch are now red.
  • Voting Booths appeared around the Island:
    • Villain Lair
    • Salty Springs
    • Retail Row
    • Lazy Links
    • Greasy Grove
    • Tilted Towers

September 20th 2025

  • Revin the Cube stopped near Lazy Links and created a high-speed dome around itself.
The Cube imprinting the sixth rune

September 21st 2025

  • Revin the Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.

September 23rd 2025

  • Birthday Cakes have appeared around the map in celebration of Fortnite's 8th Birthday:
    • Retail Row
    • Paradise Palms
    • Flush Factory
    • Greasy Grove
    • Pleasant Park
    • Lazy Links
    • Loot Lake
    • Northern Houses
    • Fatal Fields
    • Lonely Lodge
  • Revin the Cube stopped near Pleasant Park and created a high-speed dome around itself.
Birthday Cake
The Cube imprinting the final rune

September 24th 2025

  • Revin the Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.
  • Lights coming out of the Mysterious Hatch are now magenta.
    • The moon has also turned magenta.

Update v37.31[]

September 27th 2025

  • Revin the Cube moved through Tilted Towers and partially destroying the newly built sporting goods shop.

September 28th 2025

  • Revin the Cube has reached Loot Lake docks.

The Cube Sinking

  • Revin the Cube has reached the waters of Loot Lake and melted in it. Loot Lake turned red and became bouncy similar to the effect and the appearance of The Cube.
  • Lights coming out of the Mysterious Hatch are now purple.
    • The moon has also turned purple.

September 31st 2025

  • The Birthday Cakes were removed.
Cube Movement Map

Update v37.40[]

October 2nd 2025

  • The Cube has risen from the waters of Loot Lake, creating the Floating Island.
    • Loot Lake was renamed to Leaky Lake.
  • The seven runes The Cube imprinted into the ground corrupted the land around them, spawning Havoc Stones, with up to three chests around each rune, similar to the Moai Heads back in Season 5. Red rifts can be found around them.
    • All runes were reverted to the ones found in original Season 6.
  • Haunted Castle was added on a hill near Haunted Hills.
  • Four log cabins were added to Wailing Woods. Every one of the cabins has a secret room in the basement whose entrance is hidden behind a wardrobe.
    • The building in the hedge maze was turned into a secret underground laboratory.
  • Villain Lair and Hero Mansion started decaying.
  • The shack by Fatal Fields that was destroyed by the Cube is now under re-construction.
  • A Hey Boo! halloween store has appeared in Retail Row at the previously unoccupied space between McGuffin's bookstore and the unnamed camping equipment shop.
  • Demolition crew moved in and started demolishing the remains of the destroyed sporting goods shop in Tilted Towers.
  • The soccer pitch in Pleasant Park was changed into an American football pitch.
  • "No Swimming" signs have appeared around Leaky Lake.
  • Depot Race Track was added around Starry Suburbs Ruins.
  • Wooden Wolf was removed.
  • The wooden and brick stairs east of Paradise Palms were removed.
  • An infamous covered wooden bridge was added above the river by Tilted Towers.
  • The "MOON" sign was replaced by a regular NOMS sign in Retail Row.
  • A duplicate of the broken house in Retail Row appeared by Salty Springs.
  • Fatal Fields was turned into a halloween theme park, complete with three haunted houses and a field maze.
  • The Fork Knife food truck moved to Fatal Fields.
  • Lucky Temple's rotation was fixed.
  • All Moai Heads were removed.
  • TACOS building from Tilted Towers appeared in Outskirts.
  • Greasy Grove's Durrr Burger restaurant was closed due to a "bug problem".
  • A floating chair can be found by Greasy Grove.
  • Durrr Burger and Pizza Pit food trucks crashed near Leaky Lake.
  • The Motel sign disappeared once again.
  • A hut by Fatal Fields was replaced by garage auto repair found in Trucker's Oasis.
  • A giant piano appeared on a hill near Retail Row.
  • A giant piano appeared on a hill near Pleasant Park.
  • Trucks transporting Quadcrashers appeared in many places on the Island.
  • Halloween decorations started appearing around the Island.
  • Strange lights are no longer coming out of the Mysterious Hatch.

October 4th 2025

  • Floating Island started moving towards the rune southwest of Pleasant Park.
    • It moves slightly every 15 minutes.

October 5th 2025

  • The Cube lifted up the rune, causing it to absorb the rune's power which made small Cube parts grow in the basement of the house.

October 6th 2025

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune beside Shifty Shafts.

October 7th 2025

  • The Cube lifted up the rune, causing it to absorb the rune's power which made more small Cube parts grow in the basement of the house.

October 8th 2025

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune near Fatal Fields.

Update v37.50[]

October 9th 2025

  • Leaky Lake has been renamed back to Loot Lake.
    • It was quickly changed back to Leaky Lake.
  • Floating chair by Greasy Grove was removed.
  • 3 huts made out of different materials were added in 3 different places.
  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power. More Cube parts have appeared on the upper floor of the house.

October 11th 2025

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune south of Retail Row.

October 12th 2025

  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power. More Cube parts have appeared on the upper floor of the house.

October 14th 2025

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune in Wailing Woods.

October 15th 2025

  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power. More Cube parts have appeared in and around the house.

October 16th 2025

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune south of Lazy Links.

October 17th 2025

  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power. More Cube parts have appeared in and around the house.

October 18th 2025

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune west of Dusty Divot.

October 19th 2025

  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power.
    • The runes that the Cube previously absorbed are starting to rise again.

October 21st 2025

  • The runes arrived at the Floating Island and the Cube started to absorb their powers once again.

Later that day

  • The Cube absorbed enough power. The runes have fallen to the ground and the island started moving towards its original position, above Leaky Lake.

October 22nd 2025

  • The Floating Island moved back to its starting position and created a sky portal with a beam attaching it to the island.

October 23rd 2025

  • The portal in the sky has grown slightly.

Update v37.51[]

October 24th 2025

  • The portal in the sky has grown slightly.

Later that day

  • The Floating Island has split into multiple pieces.
  • Cube Monsters now spawn at each of the former runes.
  • A Battle Bus has crashed north of Leaky Lake.

October 25th 2025

  • The Cube starts to develop cracks.
    • They grow bigger every day.

Update v38.00[]

November 1st 2025

  • Red lights are coming out of the Mysterious Hatch once again.
    • The bunker contains morse code through blinking lights that translates to "Titans".
  • Inaccurate buildings were replaced with the correct ones.
  • Cube Monsters no longer spawn.
  • Portals have appeared in the secret underground laboratory in Wailing Woods.
  • The Hey Boo! Halloween Store in Retail Row closed. Leaving the spot boarded up and vacant.
    • The rest of the Halloween decor was also removed.
  • Fatal Fields was reverted back to its pre-Halloween form.
  • Crashed food trucks can now be found in Junk Junction.
  • The Fork Knife Food Truck can now be found in Paradise Palms.

November 5th 2025

  • The Cube began spitting out dark smoke and violent lightning.

November 7th 2025

  • The outer shell of the Cube has fallen off, dripping fluid into the vortex.
    • It drips every hour.

The Butterfly Event

  • The Cube explodes, causing the Floating Island itself to crash down and make multiple small islands on Leaky Lake.
  • A parachute has appeared on top of the tallest chimney in Flush Factory.

Update v38.10[]

November 11th 2025

  • The Corrupted Areas are starting to overgrow.
  • The Risky Reels marquee board was updated. It is used as a teaser for the Chapter 6 Finale Event.

November 13th 2025

  • A blizzard cloud can be seen at a distance from Flush Factory.
    • It moves closer everyday.

Update v38.11[]

November 19th 2025

  • The Morse code at the Mysterious Hatch has changed to translate "ZEROHOUR".

November 26th 2025

  • It has started to snow on Spawn Island.
  • The blizzard cloud appears to be an iceberg.
  • The tip of a castle can be seen on the iceberg.
  • Lights can be seen coming from the iceberg at night.

Update v39.10[]

December 11th 2025

  • The Iceberg has collided with the Island, adding a new piece of land and making the southwest corner of the Island colder, making it snow in there.
  • The Iceberg brought 3 new Named Locations with it:
    • Polar Peak
    • Frosty Flights
    • Happy Hamlet
  • New Unnamed Locations got added with the iceberg biome:
    • Crackshot's Cabin
    • Trog's Cave
    • Flush Factory Remains
    • Ice Sculptures
    • Rocky Smile
    • Submarine
    • Bunker Island
  • Collision caused water from Viking Village's waterfall to flood Greasy Grove which was later frozen solid.
  • The Viking Village waterfall was frozen over.
  • 2 of the factories in Yonder Yard were crushed by the Iceberg.
  • Haunted Castle is now crumbling down and decaying heavily.
  • Giant Chair was replaced by Giant Sled.
  • Remains of Flush Factory can be found buried in snow near Yonder Yard.
  • 7 Expedition Outposts were added around the Island.
  • Corrupted Areas became overgrown.
  • A giant metal turtle appeared by Lonely Lodge.
  • The houses near Risky Reels became a farm airstrip for X-4 Stormwings.
  • Leaky Lake was renamed back to Loot Lake.
  • Fort House is now made out of bricks.
  • Giant Faces were added near Pueblo and Lucky Bridge.
  • Sundial was added on one of the mountains near Trucker's Oasis.
  • Spawn Island is covered in snow.
  • Some changes happened in Northern Houses.
    • "Houses 1" were replaced by the Hangar House.
      • X-4 Stormwing can now spawn there.
    • "Houses 3" were replaced by the Abandoned Farm.
  • A stone man statue has appeared on the western side of Wailing Woods.
  • A stone woman statue has appeared on the eastern side of Wailing Woods.
  • The Block landed north of Risky Reels.
    • It landed on the coast, leaving a square-shaped crater.
  • Moai inside of Starry Suburbs Ruins has re-appeared.
  • Shape of the Depot Race Track has changed and now goes through Starry Suburbs Ruins instead of around it.
  • The building in Tilted Towers is going under re-construction yet again.
  • Large candy canes have appeared on mountains in a few locations:
    • Near Fort House
    • Near Shifty Shafts
    • Near Frosty Flights
    • Near Hilltop House
  • Christmas Trees and decorations have appeared in a few Named Locations:
    • Retail Row
    • Fatal Fields
    • Pleasant Park
    • Tilted Towers
    • Lazy Links
    • Frozen Lake
    • Lonely Lodge
    • Dusty Divot
    • Frosty Flights
    • Happy Hamlet
    • Paradise Palms
    • Lucky Landing
  • A new dumpling restaurant was added to Lucky Landing.
  • Crashed food trucks disappeared from Junk Junction.
  • Lucky Temple once again was accidentally rotated.
  • The wooden bridge by Tilted Towers was removed.

December 16th 2025

  • Polar Peak has started to melt, revealing more of the castle and some smaller houses.

Update v39.11[]

December 21st 2025

  • Polar Peak has melted much more, revealing the rest of the castle and houses.

December 25th 2025

  • The entire island was covered in snow for Christmas Day.

December 26th 2025

  • The extra snow has melted, and the island has reverted back to normal.

January 1st 2026

  • The tunnel in the back of the Polar Peak's castle has melted, revealing an entrance to the dungeon of the castle.
    • Ice in bottom of the castle has melted too, revealing a staircase to the dungeon.

Update v39.20[]

January 9th 2026

  • Roadside Diner near the Race Track was replaced by a SoFDeeZ Ice Cream Parlor.
  • The re-construction of the building in Tilted Towers is almost complete.
  • Durr Burger and Pizza Pit restaurants have appeared in Retail Row.
  • The stone man and woman have acknowledged each other.
  • All Christmas decorations were removed (except for that one string of lights in Paradise Palms).
  • The ice in Polar Peak's outer dungeon has melted some more, revealing some cages and mysterious ice eggs.
  • Frosty Flights watchtower's walls were fixed and are no longer white.

January 11th 2026

  • The ice in Polar Peak's outer dungeon has melted some more, revealing more cages, an iron maiden, and more mysterious ice eggs.
    • It continues to slightly melt more with each passing day.

January 16th 2026

  • The ice around the Infinity Blade altar has melted.
  • The ice has completely melted in Polar Peak's outer dungeon.
    • The melting has paused.

January 17th 2026

  • Props and trash pieces are floating in the water near The Block.

January 19th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • A chunk of ice has been placed where the Infinity Blade stood.

Update v39.30[]

January 22nd 2026

  • The Block has sunk farther into the ocean.
    • The props have been replaced by palm trees and other summer themed props.
  • The ice has started to melt in Polar Peak's inner dungeon.
    • The melting now continuously progresses.
  • A small amount of snow has melted on the outer edges of the snow biome.
  • The destroyed version of the Motel sign is back.
  • A small truck was added east of Happy Hamlet.
  • A tower east of Polar Peak has been expanded.
  • Trees have been added near where the 5th corrupted area used to be.
  • A Boneyard sign was added to Junk Junction.
  • The complete football stadium was added to Pleasant Park.

February 2nd 2026

  • The ice inside of the dungeon has melted more, revealing a pedestal that is chained up.
    • There is a person attached to the chains.

Update v39.40[]

February 5th 2026

  • A floating ice sphere appeared above Polar Peak.
  • The Block has sunk farther into the ocean.
    • The current props have been replaced by trees and wooden props from Moisty Mire.
  • The Rock Couple are now waving at each other across Wailing Woods.
  • The office building at Tilted Towers has now been fully constructed.
  • The big chunk of ice on Bunker Island started cracking.
  • A plane has crashed into a house near Salty Springs.
  • Red lights are coming out of the Mysterious Hatch once again.
    • The bunker contains morse code through blinking lights that translates to "Foundation".

February 12th 2026

6:00am ET[]

  • The big chunk of ice on Bunker Island can now be damaged.
    • It has 2 Billion Health and damage is carried over to other matches.
    • Red Rift Butterflies can be seen flying over Bunker Island.
  • The snow biome has slightly expanded.

2:00pm ET[]

  • The remix Ice King is now inside of the ice sphere, and his eyes can be seen glowing from the outside.
    • All TV's are now broadcasting a weather warning.

7:20pm ET[]

  • The ice covering the bunker on Bunker Island has now broken.
    • The bunker is flashing red, transmitting "FOUNDATION" in morse code.

February 13th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • All TV's are now broadcasting a countdown to the Ice Storm Live Event.

February 14th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • A countdown clock is now visible around The Ice King's ice sphere.

February 15th 2026

Ice Storm[]

  • The Ice King has broken open the sphere and summoned a gigantic phantom of him which made a snowstorm that covered the entire map with snow.
    • It also spawned ice shards that create Ice Monsters.
  • There are now Snowmen scattered around the island.

Update v39.50[]

February 19th 2026

  • The Block has sunk further into the ocean
    • The current props have been replaced by pirate themed props.

2:00pm ET[]

  • The Polar Peak ice is no longer melting continuously.

February 21st 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • The Polar Peak ice has melted down further, now revealing The Prisoner's right arm wrapped in chains.

February 22nd 2026

  • The Polar Peak ice has completely melted, and The Prisoner has escaped.
    • The ice eggs in the dungeon have vanished.

February 23rd 2026

  • Tiny amounts of snow on the northeastern edge of the island have melted.

February 24th 2026

  • More snow has melted, clearing most of Lonely Lodge, Wailing Woods and Risky Reels.

February 25th 2026

  • More snow has melted, clearing the rest of Lonely Lodge, Wailing Woods and Risky Reels.

February 26th 2026

  • More snow has melted, clearing Lazy Links, Tomato Temple, Retail Row, Junk Junction, and Paradise Palms.

February 27th 2026

  • More snow has melted, clearing Dusty Divot and Haunted Hills, while partially clearing Pleasant Park and Loot Lake.

February 28th 2026

  • More snow has melted, clearing Pleasant Park, Loot Lake, and Salty Springs, while partially clearing Fatal Fields.

March 1st 2026

  • More snow has melted, clearing the rest of Fatal Fields.

March 2nd 2026

  • More snow has melted, starting to clear Tilted Towers, Snobby Shores, and Lucky Landing.

March 3rd 2026

  • The snow has melted back to its Pre-Ice Storm state.
February 24th 2026
February 25th 2026
February 26th 2026
February 27th 2026
February 28th 2026
March 1st 2026
March 3rd 2026

Update v39.51[]

March 5th 2026

  • The Block has sunk farther into the ocean.

March 17th 2026

12:30pm ET[]

  • Earthquakes have started around the island, causing cracks in the ground.
    • The 1st crack has appeared southwest of Tomato Temple.

7:15pm ET[]

  • The 2nd crack has appeared southwest of Risky Reels.
    • Lazy Bridge has partially collapsed.

March 18th 2026

2:27am ET[]

  • The 3rd crack has appeared east of Lazy Links.

1:24pm ET[]

  • The 4th crack has appeared south of Wailing Woods.

Update v40.00[]

March 19th 2026

  • The snow has slightly melted, clearing Snobby Shores, Tilted Towers, Lucky Landing, and Sports Center.

1:33am ET[]

  • The 5th crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 1.

2:00pm ET[]

  • The 6th crack has appeared east of Risky Reels.

March 20th 2026

8:15am ET[]

  • The 7th crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 5.

8:06pm ET[]

  • The 8th crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 6.

March 21st 2026

4:54pm ET[]

  • The 9th crack has appeared east of Salty Springs.

March 22nd 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • The 10th crack has appeared north of Loot Lake.

March 24th 2026

12:03am ET[]

  • The 11th crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 4.

7:57pm ET[]

  • The 12th crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 8.

March 25th 2026

  • The grass in the west part of Wailing Woods is dying out and turning brown.

3:06am ET[]

  • The 13th crack has appeared in Lazy Links.

8:15am ET[]

  • The 14th crack has appeared in Lazy Links.

7:45pm ET[]

  • The 15th crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 9.

March 26th 2026

10:06am ET[]

  • The 16th crack has appeared in Wailing Woods.

5:03pm ET[]

  • The 17th crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 11.

March 27th 2026

4:30am ET[]

  • The 18th crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 10.

4:33pm ET[]

  • The 19th crack has appeared west of Race Track.

March 28th 2026

10:24am ET[]

  • The 20th crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 15.

March 29th 2026

1:00am ET[]

  • The 21st crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 18.

12:18pm ET[]

  • The 22nd crack has appeared, extending beyond crack 16.

7:03pm ET[]

  • The 23rd crack has appeared south of Tomato Temple.

11:24pm ET[]

  • The 24th crack has appeared west of Risky Reels.

March 30th 2026

  • Wailing Woods and the surrounding area has been covered in fog.
    • Ash is starting to arise from the ground.

8:30am ET[]

  • The 25th crack has appeared west of Race Track.

3:18pm ET[]

  • The 26th crack has appeared in Tilted Towers, destroying the News HQ.
Earthquake map

Update v40.10[]

April 1st 2026

  • The northeastern quadrant of the island has been replaced by a jungle, with a large Volcano in its center.
    • Some of the missing eggs previously seen in the Polar Peak's dungeon and a throne can be found inside of the volcano.
  • Some new Named Locations have been added alongside the jungle, including:
    • Sunny Steps
    • Lazy Lagoon
  • Added new Unnamed Locations:
    • Pirate Camp - Pleasant
    • Pirate Camp - Greasy
    • Pirate Camp - Hill
    • Pirate Camp - Dusty
    • Pirate Camp - Volcano
    • Pirate Camp - Lazy
    • Pirate Camp - Paradise
    • Fork Knife Mine
    • Jungle Moai
    • X Marks The Spot
    • Star Shack
    • The Treasure
    • Expedition Outpost Digsite
    • Expedition Outpost Solar
    • Expedition Outpost Radar
    • Expedition Outpost Jungle
    • Expedition Base
    • Hot Springs
    • Scorched Containers
  • Tomato Temple is no longer a Named Location.
    • The only remaining building is the temple.
  • The Block has yet again landed incorrectly, ending up on a mountainside west of Motel.
  • The Tomato Tunnel was filled with lava with one of its exists completely blocked off.
  • Small Volcano Vents, that push the player upwards like the holes at the Corrupted Areas, were added.
  • A knife and fork shaped hole has appeared north of Fatal Fields, replacing one of the former Corrupted Areas.
  • The two houses south of Haunted Hills have been replaced by Abandoned Farm.
  • The Two Houses east of Salty Springs were changed.
    • One of them resembles the Hangar House in Northern Houses.
  • A new building is under construction in Tilted Towers.
  • Broken houses in Salty Springs and Pleasant Park were repaired.
  • A bit of snow south of Tilted Towers has melted.
  • The stone people have vanished.
  • Turtle was removed.
  • The Durrr Burger restaurant in Retail Row expanded and now includes a restroom.
    • The Uncle Pete's Pizza Pit restaurant has expanded. It has now more seating and the basketball court is gone.
  • Brick Pig was added east of Lucky Landing.
  • Wooden Rabbit was added north of Snobby Shores.
  • Hero Mansion and Villain Lair have decayed even more.
  • A Volcano Vent has appeared in the RV Park, causing one of the vehicles to flip over.
  • Most of the Expedition Outposts have been removed.
  • Primal Settlement didn't return for an unknown reason.

2:00pm ET[]

  • A helicopter has appeared northeast of Hot Springs.
  • The Stone Lady is beginning to rise east of the Volcano.
  • The Stone Man is beginning to rise west of the Volcano.

April 3rd 2026

9:09am ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to a hill northeast of Lonely Lodge.

April 4th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • The stone people have rebuilt themselves, and they seem to be looking for each other.

April 5th 2026

4:23am ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to a hill south of Race Track.

April 6th 2026

11:14pm ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to a hill south of Junkyard.

April 8th 2026

6:45pm ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to a hill southwest of Trucker's Oasis.

April 9th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • The stone people have begun to venture south to the front of the Volcano.

3:00pm ET[]

  • A small golden Rift has appeared above Loot Lake.

April 10th 2026

1:59pm ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to a hill southeast of Happy Hamlet.

3:00pm ET[]

  • The golden Rift has expanded, showing more of the purple reality on the other side.

April 11th 2026

3:00pm ET[]

  • The Dark Voyager and the Dark Harvester have arrived.

April 12th 2026

  • The Dark Harvester has tilted slightly downwards.

9:12am ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to a hill southwest of Polar Peak.

April 13th 2026

  • The Dark Harvester is looking down at Kevin the Cube's remains.

3:00pm ET[]

  • The Dark Harvester went back through a golden rift.

April 14th 2026

4:25am ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to Viking Village.

April 15th 2026

11:35pm ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved a hill west of Pleasant Park.

Update v40.20[]

April 16th 2026

  • The building in Tilted Towers has almost finished construction.
  • The Bunker House in Snobby Shores was taken over by Vikings.
  • The Durrr Burger restaurant in Retail Row now has a second floor.
  • The stone people have moved.
    • The man is picking flowers.
    • The lady is continuing to walk.
  • The balloons and opening celebration banners at Dusty Diner were finally removed.
  • The Boneyard sign at Junk Junction was added back.
  • Hidden room in the Tomato Tunnel was fixed.

2:00pm ET[]

  • Two trucks transporting excavators have gathered near Green Steel Bridge.

April 17th 2026

6:48pm ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to eastern edge of a mountain northeast of Pleasant Park.

April 18th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • Digsite Alpha has appeared near Green Steel Bridge.

April 19th 2026

1:57pm ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to eastern edge of a mountain northeast of Loot Lake.

11:30pm ET[]

  • All of the rocks in Digsite Alpha were destroyed.
    • The excavation revealed a volcano vent, a fossil and a car wreck.

April 20th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • Trucks transporting excavators have gathered near Dusty Divot's main building.

April 21st 2026

9:11am ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to Dusty Mountain.

April 22nd 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • Digsite Beta has appeared in Dusty Divot.

April 23rd 2026

4:24am ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to a hill northwest of Tilted Towers.

9:55am ET[]

  • All of the rocks in Digsite Beta were destroyed.
    • The excavation revealed 10 chests.
    • After all the rocks were destroyed, the digsite quickly filled up with lava.

2:00pm ET[]

  • The stone people have moved.
    • The man has spotted the lady.
    • The lady is swimming across the lava pool.

April 24th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • Trucks transporting excavators have gathered east of Loot Lake.

April 26th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • Digsite Gamma has appeared east of Loot Lake.

6:46pm ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to a hill northwest of Loot Lake.

April 27th 2026

3:56pm ET[]

  • All of the rocks in Digsite Gamma were destroyed.
    • The excavation revealed the roof of The Vault.

April 28th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • The Black Helicopter has moved to one of Loot Lake's islands.

Update v40.30[]

April 30th 2026

  • The Blue House in Snobby Shores was taken over by Vikings.
  • The Block now has pirate themed props.
  • No Sweat Insurance has finished construction in Tilted Towers.
  • Snowy Race Track was added near Happy Hamlet.
  • The Uncle Pete's Pizza Pit in Retail Row now has another floor. Now with even more indoor space and a newly added Tomatohead mascot at the top.
  • More excavators and trucks have appeared near Loot Lake.
  • Pleasant Park field commentator box was added.
  • The Container by Hilltop House was removed.
  • The Reboot Van at Dusty Divot was moved to a different location.
  • The tall tower near Polar Peak was fixed.
  • Police Cars were added back to the crash scene by Hilltop House.

May 3rd 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • The trucks have arrived at Loot Lake, unloading a haul of excavators.

May 6th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • The excavators have surrounded Loot Lake's central divot.

Update v40.40[]

May 14th 2026

  • The central part of Loot Lake was dug out. The excavators have revealed The Vault. Several watchtowers and research facilities were constructed around it by The Government.
  • The Durrr Burger restaurant in Retail Row was expanded. The burger mascot has appeared at the top of the restaurant.
  • The Modern House in Snobby Shores was taken over by vikings.
  • 3 bunkers were added to houses around the island.
    • 2 in Pleasant Park and 1 in Retail Row.
  • Durrr Phone and Pizza Phone were added.

2:00pm ET[]

  • The stone people have moved.
    • The man is climbing down the ledge.
    • The lady has crossed the lava river and is calling for the man.

Update v40.41[]

May 30th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.

May 31st 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • A floating rune appeared near Lucky Temple.
    • It could be damaged, but when brought down to 0 health it would move.

June 1st 2026

3:26pm ET[]

  • The first rune has entered The Vault, causing steam to come out of the Volcano.
    • The build-up to The Unvaulting Event has begun.

June 2nd 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.

June 3rd 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • A floating rune appeared above The Vault.
  • Lasers also appeared in 3 places around the island:
    • On top of the Volcano
    • Under the Tree of Life
    • Northwest of Pleasant Park
  • They can be hit to direct the lasers towards the rune.

5:24pm ET[]

  • The second rune has entered The Vault. The steam emitting from the Volcano became darker, turning into smoke with the bottom part of it being the color of the lava.

June 4th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • A floating rune appeared above The Vault again.
    • This is very likely a mistake since this rune was already placed into The Vault.

June 5th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.
  • The stone people have moved.
    • The man is swimming across the lava while reaching for the lady.
    • The lady is reaching for the man.

Update v41.00[]

June 6th 2026

2:00pm ET[]

  • Another bunker was added in Salty Springs.
  • The Brick House in Snobby Shores was taken over by vikings.
    • The Truck House was fortified to prevent another takeover.
  • Another vault rune smashed through the wall behind the DJ booth in Yonder Yard, causing it to collapse.
  • One of The Government setups in Loot Lake now has a chalkboard in it, which displays a possible theory that the hatch is a vault of some sort.
    • 6 screens were also added.

  • C4SOG

Update v27.00[]

November 3rd 2023

  • Agent Jones utilized the time machine to journey back to 2018, returning to the original island for an extraction mission.
  • The original Island from Season 5 has returned, bringing all old locations;
    • Dusty Divot
    • Fatal Fields
    • Flush Factory
    • Greasy Grove
    • Haunted Hills
    • Junk Junction
    • Lazy Links
    • Lonely Lodge
    • Loot Lake
    • Lucky Landing
    • Paradise Palms
    • Pleasant Park
    • Retail Row
    • Risky Reels
    • Salty Springs
    • Shifty Shafts
    • Snobby Shores
    • Tilted Towers
    • Tomato Temple
    • Wailing Woods
  • At Pleasant Park's football/soccer field, Agent Jones arrived with the time machine. The broken seat lay beside it, accompanied by the Battle Bus balloon, a recording from Doctor Slone, and a truck on the other side.
  • Ziplines and Rifts have been added around the Island for easier access.
  • Reboot Vans have been added around the Island.

November 9th 2023

  • The Cube emerged from Loot Lake's waters, lifting Loot Lodge on its back to form the Floating Island.
  • The truck at Pleasant Park has begun to move, but slipped on a banana peel and crashed at the shore on the north of Loot Lake.
    • Jones crossed the lake, establishing a makeshift camp on the opposite shore of Loot Lake with the Time Machine and another Slone recording.
  • A crane and trucks have appeared at Dusty Divot, beginning to move out furniture and paintings to make way for a construction.
    • The ceiling and a pit have been opened up at the center of Dusty Diner, a second floor was also built on the outside of the building.

Update v27.10[]

November 16th 2023

  • The Iceberg has once again collided with the Island, creating a snow biome on the southwest corner of the Island, adding Frosty Flights to the Island.
    • Polar Peak is already in it's destroyed state.
  • Blackheart's crew has once again invaded the Island, creating several pirate outposts around the Island.
  • Jones has arrived at Dusty Diner with the Time Machine and another Slone recording.
  • Furniture has been further packed and moved out of Dusty Diner's red warehouse, as the interior has been transformed from a diner into a lab.
    • The Rocket was built at the center of Dusty Diner, as more scaffolding was built around it and a second floor was added inside the building
  • A blue glow and waves started coming out of the vortex underneath the Floating Island in Loot Lake.

Update v27.11[]

November 21st 2023

  • An 11-day countdown has appeared above the rocket at Dusty Divot.

November 23rd 2023

  • The Meteor has returned, suspended over the island.
  • Everything that was packed within Dusty Diner has been moved out and placed inside containers outside of the building.
    • The gift shop in Dusty Diner became a laboratory as a result. The roof was transformed into a platform.
  • Another Slone recording can be found within Dusty Diner.
  • The Time Machine has been attached to the rocket.
  • The Zero Point has emerged at Loot Lake, underneath the Floating Island.

  • S0
  • S2
  • S3
  • S4
  • S5
  • S6
  • S7
  • S8
  • S9
  • SX

Update v1.6[]

September 12th 2017

  • Fortnite: Battle Royale was released.
  • 10 Named Locations were added.
    • Pleasant Park
    • Loot Lake
    • Moisty Mire
    • Retail Row
    • Fatal Fields
    • Anarchy Acres
    • Wailing Woods
    • Lonely Lodge
    • Greasy Grove
    • Flush Factory
  • 26 Unnamed Locations were added.
    • Risky Farm
    • Factory
    • Truckasaurus
    • Pleasant Manor
    • Race Track
    • RV Park
    • Anarchy Bridge
    • Lucky Bridge
    • Green Steel Bridge
    • Orange Steel Bridge
    • Northern Houses
    • Stretched Mountain
    • Dusty Mountain
    • Stunt Mountain
    • Flush Mountain
    • Giant Chair
    • Tree of Life
    • Tomato Tunnel
    • Bear
    • Container Yard
    • Precarious Flatbed
    • Encircled Tree
    • Fort House
    • Prison
    • Crashed Battle Bus
    • Circle of Hedges
    • Truck Coast

Update v1.7.1[]

October 11th 2017

  • 3 previously unnamed locations received a name:
    • Salty Springs
    • Dusty Depot
    • Tomato Town
  • Hilltop House was added.
  • A TACOS Restaurant and a Brick House were added to Tomato Town.
  • Added some more houses around the map.
  • Some changes happened in Northern Houses.
    • A hut was replaced by the shack.
    • "Houses 3" were added.

Update v1.11[]

December 13th 2017

  • Christmas Trees have appeared in few Named Locations:
    • Retail Row
    • Fatal Fields
    • Pleasant Park (Replaced gazebo)
    • Loot Lake
    • Anarchy Acres
    • Greasy Grove
    • Wailing Woods
    • Spawn Island
  • Bushes were covered in christmas lights.

Update v2.2.0[]

January 18th 2018

  • The Island went through a major revamp.
  • Added 5 new Named Locations:
    • Tilted Towers
    • Shifty Shafts
    • Snobby Shores
    • Haunted Hills
    • Junk Junction
  • Added new Unnamed Locations:
    • Convenience Store
    • Starry Suburbs Ruins
    • Sports Center
    • Motel
    • Umbrella Mine
    • Metal Llama
    • Yonder Yard
    • Outskirts
    • Blurry Billboards
  • Added new biomes:
    • Boreal Forest
    • Northern Houses
    • Forest
    • Swamp
  • Giant Chair is now bigger.
  • Tomato Tunnel now includes an emergency staircase.
  • Added some more huts around the Island.
  • Pleasant Manor was updated.
  • Christmas Trees and bush christmas lights were removed.

Update v2.50[]

February 13th 2018

  • Shrines have appeared across the map.

Update v3.00[]

February 21st 2018

  • Wooden Crab was added.
  • A Pass 'N' Gas Gas Station was added in Salty Springs.

Update v3.10[]

February 27th 2018

  • Lucky Landing was added.
  • Happy Chinese New Year! Props were added.

Update v3.30[]

March 20th 2018

  • The Meteor has appeared in the sky of the island.
    • It gets closer to the island as time passes

Update v3.40[]

March 28th 2018

  • Vending Machines were added across the map.

March 29th 2018

  • Telescope camps appeared around the island, looking towards the meteor.

Update v3.50[]

April 11th 2018

  • Dancefloors were added in 3 points on the Island:
    • Pleasant Manor
    • Flush Factory
    • RV Park

Update v3.60[]

April 24th 2018

  • A small camp appeared on a building in Tilted Towers with signs with a UFO drawing and text that read "Today Tomorrow".

April 25th 2018

  • Televisions around the island began broadcasting a test-pattern graphic of a Llama and unintelligible audio.

April 26th 2018

  • Meteorites began falling from the sky during matches.
    • The amount of meteorites would increase as the match progressed.

Update v4.00[]

May 1st 2018

  • The meteor has crashed into Dusty Depot scattering rubble over the area, partially destroying the location and creating a crater, where a research facility was built around the meteor to find out what is inside it, creating Dusty Divot.
  • A drive-in theater known as Risky Reels was built, it was also damaged by a meteorite.
  • A mansion was built southeast of Lonely Lodge with a secret underground area and a open side that led into a cliff, which served as the Heroes' base.
  • Loot Lake has been hit with rubble from the impact of the meteor in Dusty Depot.
  • A Villain Lair with a Rocket and a Launch pad was added on top of a mountain east of Snobby Shores.
  • A secret base was added 3-basement underneath the blue house of Salty Springs. The base has also a control system and a gym.
  • A meteorite crashed into the office building at Tilted Towers, destroying the building.
  • A meteorite has crashed into the Prison, destroying the middle area.
  • Moisty Mire was converted into a large production set with green screens, props and stages.
  • A warehouse in Yonder Yard was replaced with a club.
  • Movie sets were added around the Island:
    • Green Steel Bridge
    • Giant Footprint
    • Haunted Hills
    • Filming Studio
  • Shifty Shafts houses were revamped.

Update v4.10[]

May 8th 2018

  • All 3 dancefloors added in previous season got removed.
  • The central facility in Dusty Divot was covered up by some roof panels.
  • A mysterious bunker was added in Wailing Woods.

Update v4.20[]

May 16th 2018

  • The crater in Tilted Towers was patched up. A dump truck is clearing the debris and remains of furniture from the destroyed area.
  • The progress on The Meteor's excavation is halfway done. A metallic container can be seen through certain areas of the meteor.
  • A Fork Knife food truck appeared in Retail Row.
  • The movie titles on the Risky Reels marquee board were updated:
    • "Carbide Returns"
    • "Valor Origins"
    • "Omega's Revenge"

Update v4.30[]

May 30th 2018

  • Dusty Divot's meteorite excavation is almost completed. Trees and grass started growing in the crater area.
  • The crater in Risky Reels is being patched up.
  • The movie titles on the Risky Reels marquee board were updated:
    • "Dusty Impact" - reference to "Deep Impact", a 1998 science fiction disaster film.
    • "The Hills are Hunted"
    • "The Cabin in Wailing Woods" - reference to "The Cabin in the Woods", a 2012 horror comedy film
  • Tilted Towers Hop Rocks convoy has reached the Sports Center and is heading towards the Villain Lair.
  • Trucks were flipped on the outer crater near southwest of Pleasant Park.
  • Omega and Carbide posters have appeared on the Island.
  • Dancing platform and a disco ball was added inside of the Northern Factory in Loot Lake.
  • The Fork Knife food truck moved to Greasy Grove.

Update v4.40[]

June 11th 2018

  • Open Soccer Stadium was added, replacing the Starry Suburbs Ruins.
  • Dusty Divot meteor excavation was completed. An empty space pod was found at the core of the rock. Cars and a chopper on area of the west part have been flipped. Trees and grass continues to grow in Dusty Divot.
  • The Hop Rocks convoy from Tilted Towers is now approaching Snobby Shores
  • Wooden ramps have appeared on the mountain near south of Pleasant Park.
  • Hop Rocks and meteorite fragments have been found at the Villain Lair.
  • Craters on Risky Reels was completely patched up.
  • The Fork Knife food truck moved to Open Soccer Stadium.
  • The movie titles on the Risky Reels marquee board were updated:
    • "The Beautiful Game" - possible reference to The Beautiful Game, better known as "The Match", a 1999 romantic comedy film.
    • "Nothing But Not"
    • "Mirror of Lies"
  • The Crashed Battle Bus has changed design and now has a proper deflated balloon prop.
  • Demolition of the old building in Tilted Towers is almost complete by a demolishing crane.
  • The Hop Rocks convoy from Risky Reels is now passing through Anarchy Acres.
  • Crater near the Fatal Fields is being patched up. The convoy is being escorted west across the bridge.
  • Soccer goal pitches appeared in many places around the map:
    • Risky Reels
    • Fatal Fields
    • Flush Factory
    • Container Yard

Update v4.50[]

June 27th 2018

  • A detective agency office was at the vacant space of Retail Row's commercial area.
  • The movie titles on the Risky Reels marquee board were updated:
    • "White Lion"
    • "The Orange Crusher"
    • "TV Dreams"
  • Crater on the southeast of Retail Row was filled up. The Hop Rocks convoy from the crater started moving.
  • Convoy from Risky Reels is now in Pleasant Park.
  • Crater near Fatal Fields was completely patched up. The Hop Rocks convoy is on their way to Greasy Grove.
  • The crater near Haunted Hills have been also completely patched up. The convoy is heading to the Villain Lair.
  • A new building is under construction on the patched up crater in Tilted Towers.
  • Cars and equipments have moved from the Dusty Divot site and has been deserted. Grass and trees continues to grow up to the central site of the divot. Few Hop Rocks in the area still remain.
  • The Rocketship in the Villain Lair was fully upgraded.
  • A 72-hour countdown timer can be seen flashing on the televisions.
  • A siren can be heard coming from the Villain Lair.

Blast Off

  • The Rocket blasted off, creating the giant Crack in the Sky in the process.
  • Rocket's thruster can be found in Anarchy Acres.
  • Following the Rocket launch, a rift has appeared in Lonely Lodge.

June 30th 2018

  • The sign in Lonely Lodge was rifted away.

July 1st 2018

  • A rift started forming around the Motel sign.
  • New part of The Crack in the Sky has opened above the mountain near Greasy Grove.

July 2nd 2018

  • The Motel sign was rifted away.
  • A rift started forming around the rotating Tomato Head in Tomato Town.

July 3rd 2018

  • The rotating Tomato Head was rifted away.
  • A rift started forming around the NOMS sign in Retail Row.
  • The part of The Crack in the Sky above Anarchy Acres has expanded.

July 4th 2018

  • The NOMS sign was rifted away.
  • A rift started forming around the Durrr Burger head in Greasy Grove.

July 5th 2018

  • The Durrr Burger head was rifted away.
  • A rift started forming on the mountain northwest of Greasy Grove.

July 6th 2018

  • An anchor rifted in on the mountain northwest of Greasy Grove.

July 7th 2018

  • A rift started forming on a hill north of Moisty Mire.

July 8th 2018

  • A carriage rifted in on a hill north of Moisty Mire.

July 9th 2018

  • A rift started forming on one of the Moisty Mire islands.

July 10th 2018

  • A set of skeletal bones appeared at the previous location of the rift at I9.

July 11th 2018

  • Another part of the crack has opened in the sky, with sand and snow coming out of it.

Update v5.00[]

July 12th 2018

  • Moisty Mire was replaced by the Desert, bringing in a new city with it, Paradise Palms, located at the place of the Stagecoach originally rifted into Moisty Mire.
  • Added new Unnamed Locations:
    • Dino Park
    • Junkyard
    • Pueblo
    • The Burger
    • Cacti Forest
    • Trucker's Oasis
    • The Birthplace
    • Roadside Diner
    • Calamity's Residence
  • Prison, Convenience Store, Circle of Hedges, Wooden Crab, and Truck Coast were removed along with Moisty Mire.
  • The Race Track southeast of Retail Row was revamped with a proper concrete race track.
  • A fancy golf club named Lazy Links was rifted onto the Island, replacing Anarchy Acres.
  • The abandoned Dusty Divot was overgrown with grass, trees and small ponds.
  • Viking Village was rifted to the summit of a mountain near Greasy Grove.
  • Open Soccer Stadium was removed.
  • Brick Fox was removed
  • Missing NOMS sign appeared north east of Risky Reels.
  • The missing Durrr Burger head from Greasy Grove's Durrr Burger Restaurant got rifted back in. It can be found on a hill east of Pleasant Park.
  • Goodbye signs were put out on the roof and the parking lot of the Pizza Pit in Tomato Town.
    • Similar signs can be found on the roof and sidewalk of the Durrr Burger in Greasy Grove.
  • 7 Moai Heads were added around the Island.
  • Most of the movie sets were removed.
  • Ramps were added in many places around the Island.
  • The Fork Knife food truck moved to Paradise Palms.

Update v5.10[]

July 24th 2018

  • The drive-in section has been lined up with cars. Flipped cars and destroyed houses' roofs were fixed.
  • A tombstone was added east of Paradise Palms to pay homage to the "greatest rescue mission in Fortnite[5]".
  • Trucks have appeared between Salty Springs and Dusty Divot.
  • Birthday Cakes have appeared around the map in celebration of Fortnite's 1st Birthday:
    • Fatal Fields
    • Flush Factory
    • Pleasant Park
    • Loot Lake
    • Lazy Links
    • Greasy Grove
    • Lonely Lodge
    • Paradise Palms
    • Northern Houses

Update v5.20[]

August 7th 2018

  • The truck has moved to the western side of Dusty Divot.
  • The Crack in the Sky has shrunk a bit. Parts of it are less bright and one of the trails is barely visible.
  • Birthday Cakes were removed.

Update v5.21[]

August 15th 2018

  • The Crack in the Sky continues to shrink.
  • A rift appeared in Tomato Town on top of Pizza Pit.

August 19th 2018

  • The rift spits out a small stone tomato head statue.

Update v5.30[]

August 23rd 2018

  • Tomato Town was replaced by Tomato Temple.
  • The Risky Reels screen was fixed and now displays the winning entry of the Fortnite Blockbuster Contest, "Prepare For Collision".
    • Posters of the movie can be found in the area.
  • The movie titles on the Risky Reels marquee board were updated:
    • "Prepare For Collision"
    • "The Misadventures Of Lock and Salem"
    • "The Incredible Izzie"
  • The Crack in the Sky shrunk significantly and turned a dark shade of purple.
  • The trucks have moved to the northwestern side of Dusty Divot.
  • The construction of the new building in Tilted Towers resumes.
  • The Motel sign was rifted back in. (As shown in the Signing Back In Loading Screens)

Crack Closure

  • The Crack in the Sky started sending lightning strikes to a mountain east of Fatal Fields, destroying each cacti in a formation. Strikes got stronger and lasted longer with time.
  • The Crack in the Sky became smaller with each strike.
  • After the last cacti was destroyed, the crack closed and a mysterious purple cube appeared. After some time The Cube started rolling, staring a 26 days-long journey.
    • It rolled roughly every 1 hour and 43 minutes.

August 28th 2018

  • The Cube crushed a hut.
  • The Cube stopped near Fatal Fields and created a low-gravity dome around itself.

August 29th 2018

  • The Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.

September 2nd 2018

  • The Cube stopped near Greasy Grove and created a low-gravity dome around itself.

September 3rd 2018

  • The Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.

September 5th 2018

  • The Cube stopped near Salty Springs and created a low-gravity dome around itself.

Update v5.40[]

September 6th 2018

  • Dusty Diner was opened in the remains of Dusty Depot.
  • The building in Tilted Towers that the meteor destroyed is now fully constructed and is now an outdoor store with a thrift shop in the basement.
  • The soccer pitch in Pleasant Park was changed into an American football pitch.
  • The Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.

September 7th 2018

  • The Cube stopped near Retail Row and created a low-gravity dome around itself.

September 8th 2018

  • The Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.

September 10th 2018

  • The Cube stopped in Wailing Woods and created a low-gravity dome around itself.

September 11th 2018

  • The Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.

September 13th 2018

  • The Cube stopped near Lazy Links and created a low-gravity dome around itself.

September 14th 2018

  • The Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.

September 16th 2018

  • The Cube stopped near Pleasant Park and created a low-gravity dome around itself.

September 17th 2018

  • The Cube started rolling again. It left a rune behind.

Update v5.41[]

September 18th 2018

  • The Cube moved through Tilted Towers and partially destroying the newly built sporting goods shop.

September 19th 2018

  • The Cube has reached Loot Lake docks.

The Cube Sinking

  • The Cube has reached the waters of Loot Lake and melted in it. Loot Lake turned purple and became bouncy similar to the effect and the appearance of The Cube.
Cube Movement Map

Update v6.00[]

September 27th 2018

  • The Cube has risen from the waters of Loot Lake, creating the Floating Island.
  • The seven runes The Cube imprinted into the ground corrupted the land around them, spawning a new item, Shadow Stones, with up to three chests around each rune, similar to the Moai Heads back in Season 5.
  • Haunted Castle was added on a hill near Haunted Hills.
  • Corn has started growing on the fields in Fatal Fields.
  • Four log cabins were added to Wailing Woods. Every one of the cabins has a secret room in the basement whose entrance is hidden behind a wardrobe.
    • The building in the hedge maze was turned into a secret underground laboratory.
  • Villain Lair and Hero Mansion started decaying.
  • All Moai Heads were removed.
  • The shack by Fatal Fields that was destroyed by the Cube is now under re-construction.
  • A Hey Boo! halloween store has appeared in Retail Row at the previously unoccupied space between McGuffin's bookstore and the unnamed camping equipment shop.
  • The remains of the sporting goods shop destroyed by The Cube in Tilted Towers was surrounded by a wooden fence.
  • The American football pitch in Pleasant Park was changed back into a soccer pitch.
  • 3 huts made out of different materials were added in 3 different places.
    • They're most likely a reference to a fable titled "The Three Little Pigs".
  • The Fork Knife food truck moved to Trucker's Oasis.
  • "No Swimming" signs have appeared around Loot Lake.

September 28th 2018

  • Floating Island started moving towards the rune southwest of Pleasant Park.
  • Halloween decorations are slowly appearing in many different places on the map.

September 29th 2018

  • The Cube lifted up the rune, causing it to absorb the rune's power which made small Cube parts grow in the basement of the house.

October 1st 2018

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune beside Shifty Shafts.

Update v6.01[]

October 3rd 2018

  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power. More Cube parts have appeared on the house, even creating a couple inside the house itself.

October 5th 2018

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune northwest of Fatal Fields.

October 6th 2018

  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power. More Cube parts have appeared on the upper floor of the house.

October 8th 2018

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune south of Retail Row.

October 10th 2018

  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power. More Cube parts have appeared on the wood beams just below the house.

Update v6.02[]

October 10th 2018

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune inside of Wailing Woods.
  • Loot Lake was renamed to Leaky Lake.

October 13th 2018

  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power. More Cube parts have appeared in the attic.

October 14th 2018

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the rune beside Lazy Links.

Update v6.10[]

October 16th 2018

  • A Pizza Pit food truck appeared in Tomato Temple.
  • Demolition crew moved in and started demolishing the remains of the destroyed sporting goods shop in Tilted Towers.
  • Depot Race Track was added in the former place of the Open Soccer Stadium.
  • Trucks transporting Quadcrashers appeared in many places on the Island.
  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power.

October 17th 2018

  • The Cube absorbed enough power, placing the rune back into the ground and leaving a beam of light.
    • The island started moving towards the middle of Athena.

October 18th 2018

  • The Cube lifted up the rune and started to absorb its power.
    • The runes that the Cube previously absorbed are starting to rise again.

October 19th 2018

  • The runes started to float towards the Floating Island.

October 20th 2018

  • The runes arrived at the Floating Island and the Cube started to absorb their powers once again.
    • The Cube absorbed enough power. The runes have fallen to the ground and The island started moving towards its original position, above Leaky Lake.

October 21st 2018

  • Floating Island moved back to its starting position and created a Sky Portal with a beam attaching it to the island.

October 22nd 2018

  • The portal in the sky has grew significantly.

Update v6.20[]

October 24th 2018

  • Halloween decor was added all around the Island (mostly residental areas) for Fortnitemares 2018.
  • Floating Island exploded into 3 major and 4 minor pieces.
  • Fatal Fields was turned into a halloween theme park, complete with three haunted houses and a field maze.
  • The Fork Knife food truck moved to Fatal Fields.
  • A Battle Bus has crashed north of Leaky Lake.
    • The former Battle Bus located north, east of Shifty Shafts has disappeared.
  • The Runes are no longer glowing.
  • A Pizza Pit food truck appeared in Greasy Grove.

October 26th 2018

  • The Cube started to develop cracks.
    • These cracks grew bigger each day.

Update v6.21[]

November 1st 2018

  • A giant piano appeared on a hill near Retail Row.
  • Greasy Grove's Durrr Burger restaurant was closed due to a "bug problem".
  • Strange noises can also be heard from the Cube.

November 3rd 2018

  • The outer shell of Cube has fallen off it, revealing a slimy inside that occasionally leaks out what appears to be goo.

The Butterfly Event[]

  • The Cube explodes, causing the Floating Island itself to crash down and make multiple small islands on Leaky Lake.

November 5th 2018

  • As Fortnitemares 2018 ended, the Hey Boo! Halloween Store in Retail Row closed. Leaving the spot boarded up and vacant.
    • The rest of the Halloween decor was also removed.

Update v6.22[]

November 6th 2018

  • Corrupted Areas started to overgrow.
  • The soccer pitch in Pleasant Park was changed into an American football pitch.
  • A Durrr Burger food truck appeared in Greasy Grove. The food fight has began.
  • Durrr Burger restaurant's windows have been boarded up.

November 8th 2018

  • A parachute has appeared on top of the tallest chimney in Flush Factory.

November 10th 2018

  • The food trucks are now at Sports Center.

Update v6.30[]

November 14th 2018

  • The food trucks are now at Pleasant Park.
  • Refined Rift Portals have appeared in the Secret Lab, connecting it and the cabins.
  • The NOMS sign has re-appeared in Retail Row.

November 18th 2018

  • The food trucks are now at Haunted Hills.

November 19th 2018

  • A blizzard cloud can first be seen at a distance from Flush Factory.
    • With each day it got closer to the Island.

November 20th 2018

  • The food trucks are now at the Depot Race Track.
  • The NOMS sign has re-reappeared in its original place in Retail Row.

November 24th 2018

  • The food trucks are now at the Motel.

Update v6.31[]

November 27th 2018

  • The food trucks are now at Lazy Links.

November 28th 2018

  • The blizzard cloud turns out to be a Iceberg, later known as Polar Peak.

November 29th 2018

  • The tip of a castle can be seen on the Iceberg.

November 30th 2018

  • The food trucks are now near Tomato Temple.
  • The lights in the Iceberg were turned on.

December 1st 2018

  • The food trucks are now near Dusty Diner.

December 4th 2018

  • It started snowing on the Spawn Island.
  • The food trucks are now in Retail Row.

Update v7.00[]

December 6th 2018

  • The Iceberg has collided with the Island, adding a new piece of land and making the southwest corner of the Island colder, making it snow in there.
  • The Iceberg brought 3 new Named Locations with it:
    • Polar Peak
    • Frosty Flights
    • Happy Hamlet
  • New Unnamed Locations got added with the iceberg biome:
    • Crackshot's Cabin
    • Trog's Cave
    • Flush Factory Remains
    • Ice Sculptures
    • Rocky Smile
    • Submarine
    • Bunker Island
  • Collision caused water from Viking Village's waterfall to flood Greasy Grove which was later frozen solid.
  • The Viking Village waterfall was frozen over.
  • 2 of the factories in Yonder Yard were crushed by the Iceberg.
  • Haunted Castle is now crumbling down and decaying heavily.
  • Giant Chair was replaced by Giant Sled.
  • Remains of Flush Factory can be found burried in snow near Yonder Yard.
  • Ziplines and 7 Expedition Outposts were added around the Island.
  • Corrupted Areas became overgrown.
    • Shadow Stones no longer spawn there.
  • A giant metal turtle appeared by Lonely Lodge.
