  • The houses near Risky Reels became a farm airstrip for X-4 Stormwings.
  • An outdoor Durrr Burger restaurant has opened around the food truck in Retail Row.
  • Leaky Lake was renamed back to Loot Lake.
  • Fort House is now made out of bricks.
  • Giant Faces were added near Pueblo and Lucky Bridge.
  • Sundial was added on one of the mountains near Trucker's Oasis.
  • The giant piano was moved outside of Lonely Lodge.
  • A dancefloor minigame was added in the basement of Hero Mansion.
  • Spawn Island is covered in snow.
  • Some changes happened in Northern Houses.
    • "Houses 1" were replaced by the Hangar House.
      • X-4 Stormwing can now spawn there.
    • "Houses 3" were replaced by the Abandoned Farm.
  • A X-4 Stormwing crashed into a house between Retail Row and Salty Springs.[6]
  • A stone man statue has appeared in Wailing Woods.
  • A sign reading "Boneyard" has appeared outside the Junk Junction main gate.

December 7th 2018

  • Risky Reels was crushed by The Block.

Update v7.01[]

December 11th 2018

  • Polar Peak has melted a little and revealed the new Infinity Blade altar. It also revealed smaller houses around the altar.

December 14th 2018

  • The Infinity Blade is now gone from the altar, due to it being vaulted.

Update v7.10[]

December 18th 2018

  • Polar Peak has melted much more, revealing more of the castle, and the rest of a few of the houses.
    • A small piece of ice was added in place of where the Infinity Blade would stand.
  • The NOMS sign in Retail Row disappeared.
    • A small Pizza Pit restaurant building has also been added next to the Pizza Pit truck.
  • A new Dumpling restaraunt was added to Lucky Landing.
  • Large candy canes have appeared on mountains in few locations:
    • Near Fort House
    • Near Shifty Shafts
    • Near Frosty Flights
    • Near Hilltop House
  • Christmas Trees have appeared in few Named Locations:
    • Retail Row
    • Fatal Fields
    • Pleasant Park
    • Tilted Towers
    • Lazy Links
    • Frozen Lake
    • Lonely Lodge
    • Dusty Divot
    • Frosty Flights
    • Happy Hamlet
    • Paradise Palms
    • Lucky Landing
  • The Block was changed to "Grimy Greens" by KAANCITAK.
  • The snow biome is starting to spread and expand.

December 23rd 2018

  • The Block was changed to "Risky Runways" by AKE.

December 25th 2018

  • The whole Island was covered in snow for Christmas Day.

December 26th 2018

  • The snow disappeared.

December 30th 2018

  • The Block was changed to "Mysterious Markets" by Bludriv.

January 1st 2019

  • The tunnel in the back of the Polar Peak has melted, revealing an entrance to the dungeon of the castle. The dungeon contains some cages, an iron maiden and mysterious ice eggs.

January 2nd 2019

  • All Christmas decorations were removed (except for that one sting of lights in Paradise Palms).

January 4th 2019

  • The big chunk of ice on Bunker Island started cracking.

January 8th 2019

  • The Block was changed to "DM Arena" by KojackNumber2.
  • Most Christmas Decorations (Trees, Candy Canes and Snowflakes) have returned, due to the "14 Days of Fortnite" Event being brought back for 7 more days.

Update v7.20[]

January 15th 2019

  • All of the 14 Days Of Fortnite Christmas decorations were removed once again.
  • A floating ice sphere appeared above Polar Peak, containing The Ice King inside of it.
    • The iceberg has also melted even more, revealing more of the castle dungeon and Hybrid eggs.
  • The re-construction of the building in Tilted Towers is almost complete.
  • Roadside Diner near the Race Track was changed into a SoFDeeZ Ice Cream Parlor.
  • The Block was changed to "Looming Llama" by Stormhawk.
  • A stone lady statue has appeared at Lonely Lodge.
  • The snow biome has expanded a bit more.
  • A big chunk of ice on Bunker Island can now be damaged with weapons in-game. It has 5 Billion Health and damage is carried over to other matches.

January 16th 2019

  • The big chunk of ice was destroyed and revealed a bunker, similar to the one in Wailing Woods. It cannot be opened or destroyed.
    • It could have been a test for "The Search for The Vault" that will happen next season.
  • TVs began displaying a "Weather Warning" screen, which warn of a snowstorm coming to the island.

January 17th 2019

  • Televisions are now displaying a 48-hour weather countdown, similar to back in Season 4.

January 18th 2019

  • Strange symbols resembling The Ice Kingdom emblem appeared around the Polar Peak Sphere. They serve as a countdown to the event.

Ice Storm

  • The Ice King has broke open the sphere and summoned a gigantic phantom of him which made a snowstorm that covered the entire map with snow again. It also spawned ice shards that create Ice Monsters that are very similar to the Cube Monsters in Season 6.

January 22nd 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Omega Pyramid" by Directingpete.
  • There are now Snowmen scattered around the map.
  • The big chunk of ice inside the Polar Peak castle dungeon has slightly melted.
  • The construction of the Tilted Towers building is nearly done.

January 26th 2019

  • The ice inside of the dungeon has melted more, revealing some type of pedestal that is chained up. There may be a person trapped inside the ice.

January 28th 2019

  • The piece of ice in the castle dungeon is melting and has revealed a chained pedestal - an arm is sticking out of the ice.

Update v7.30[]

January 29th 2019

  • The chunk of ice in the Polar Peak dungeon has completely melted, and it's prisoner has escaped.
  • Durrr Burger has expanded their establishment, creating a proper indoor building in place of the outdoor spot.
  • The new Tilted Towers building was finally finished - it is a News HQ building.
  • A stage is being set up at Pleasant Park where the Football Field is.
  • The Stone Man statue has moved again.
  • The Block was changed to "CoLLAMAsseum" by Zartbot.
  • All of the snow over the map is starting to melt, starting from the north-east part of the map.

January 30th 2019

  • More of the map, including The Block, Wailing Woods and Lonely Lodge, has melted.
  • Some speakers and stages have been set up at Pleasant Park.

January 31st 2019

  • Even more snow across the map, including Tomato Temple, Lazy Links and Junk Junction, Retail Row and Paradise Palms has melted.

February 1st 2019

  • The stage at Pleasant Park has been fully set up, complete with lights and singing equipment.
  • The snow across the map is still melting, with Salty Springs, Pleasant Park, Fatal Fields, Dusty Divot, Loot Lake and Haunted Hills melted.

February 2nd 2019

  • As a NPC, Marshmello performed a 10 minute-long concert, with music, lights, holograms and more, at Pleasant Park.
  • A mysterious light from a distant mountain outside the map has appeared.
  • The snow on the map has melted back to how it was before the ice sphere was destroyed.

February 3rd 2019

  • The stage at Pleasant Park is now gone.

February 5th 2019

  • The Pleasant Park football field was changed once again, due to Super Bowl LIII.
  • The Block was changed to "Lunar Street Festival" by NiBLL.
  • There are Chinese new year decorations around the map.
  • The ground is occasionally shaking and rumbling noises can be heard, which is an earthquake. 

February 6th 2019

  • The Pleasant Park football field was changed back to normal.
  • The earthquakes are getting more intense, and trees and other objects are falling over. 

February 7th 2019

  • The earthquakes gotten stronger, causing cracks in the ground. The first one has appeared near Tomato Temple.
January 29th 2019
January 30th 2019
January 31st 2019
February 1st 2019
February 2nd 2019

Update v7.40[]

February 14th 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Oily Oaks" by MrSlickWillyz.
  • The snow has started to melt in Snobby Shores, Tilted Towers, Sports Center and the Hilltop House.
  • The Hybrid Eggs in the Polar Peak dungeon disappeared.
  • The Stone Man and the Stone Lady statues started waving at each other.
  • Uncle Pete's Pizza Pit in Retail Row was expanded to include a restroom. The kitchen was relocated and now goes through part of the basketball court.
  • A crack has appeared near Tomato Temple.
  • A second crack has formed between Tomato Temple and Lazy Links.

February 15th 2019

  • Another earthquake occurred near Lazy Links.
  • A crack has appeared near Wailing Woods.

February 16th 2019

  • A 5th crack opened up near the first one.
  • A 6th earthquake created a crack near The Block.

February 17th 2019

  • A crack has formed near Dusty Diner.
  • Another crack has formed near The Block.

February 18th 2019

  • A new crack has formed east of Salty Springs.

February 19th 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Colossal Compound" by Aril_lian1.
  • Crack #10 has formed north of Loot Lake.
  • Lazy Bridge has partially collapsed.
  • The Quadcrashers at Depot Race Track were replaced by Driftboards.

February 21st 2019

  • The crack near Wailing Woods has expanded.
  • Another crack has formed north of The Block.

February 22nd 2019

  • A crack has formed at Lazy Links.
  • The 14th has opened up west of Lazy Links.
  • A crack appeared East of Salty Springs.

February 23rd 2019

  • A crack has formed in Wailing Woods.
  • The 17th crack is now near Retail Row.

February 24th 2019

  • A crack has formed near Pleasant Park.
  • Another crack has appeared in the Desert.
  • The grass in the west part of Wailing Woods is dying out and turning brown.

February 25th 2019

  • Crack #20 has formed southeast of Salty Springs.
  • The grass in Wailing Woods is continuing to dry up, and the trees are turning a brownish color.

February 26th 2019

  • A earthquake created a crack outside Pleasant Park.
  • The 22nd crack has formed near Wailing Woods.

February 27th 2019

  • Another crack has formed between Dusty Divot and Tomato Tunnel.
  • Yet another crack has formed near The Block.
  • The 25th crack has formed near Race Track.
  • A large crack ripped through Tilted Towers, destroying the News HQ (again).
  • Wailing Woods now has ashes rising from the ground. All of the forest is brown and dried up, including The Block and parts of Tomato Temple and Lonely Lodge.

Update v8.00[]

February 28th 2019

  • Northern Houses and Wailing Woods were replaced by jungle, with a large Volcano and lava river at the centre.
    • Some of the missing eggs previously seen in the Polar Peak dungeon and a throne can be found inside the volcano.
  • Added new Named Locations:
    • Sunny Steps
    • Lazy Lagoon
  • Added new Unnamed Locations:
    • Pirate Camp - Pleasant
    • Pirate Camp - Greasy
    • Pirate Camp - Hill
    • Pirate Camp - Dusty
    • Pirate Camp - Volcano
    • Pirate Camp - Lazy
    • Pirate Camp - Paradise
    • Fork Knife Mine
    • Jungle Moai
    • Primal Settlement
    • X Marks The Spot
    • Star Shack
    • The Treasure
    • Expedition Outpost Digsite
    • Expedition Outpost Solar
    • Expedition Outpost Radar
    • Expedition Outpost Jungle
    • Expedition Base
    • Hot Springs
    • Plant Family
    • Scorched Containers
  • Tomato Temple is no longer a Named Location.
    • The only remaining building is the temple.
  • Jungle Face was added.
  • The Block is now located in the northwest part of the map, replacing Motel.
    • It was changed to "Cryptic Castle" by Hellraiser Gaming.
  • The Tomato Tunnel was filled with lava with one of its exists completly blocked off.
  • Small Volcano Vents, that push the player upwards like the holes at the Corrupted Areas, were added.
  • A knife and fork shaped hole has appeared north of Fatal Fields, replacing one of the former Corrupted Areas.
  • The two houses south of Haunted Hills were changed.
  • The two houses east of Salty Springs were changed.
    • One of them resembles Hangar House of Northern Houses.
  • New building is under construction in Tilted Towers.
  • Broken houses in Salty Springs and Pleasant Park were repaired.
  • A bit of snow near Tilted Towers has melted.
  • The stone people were sadly destroyed.
  • Turtle was removed.
  • The Durrr Burger restaurant in Retail Row expanded and now includes a restroom.
  • Brick Pig was added east of Lucky Landing.
  • Wooden Rabbit was added north of Snobby Shores.
  • A Volcano Vent has appeared in the RV Park, causing one of the vehicles to flip over.
  • Most of the Expedition Outposts was removed.

Update v8.01[]

March 6th 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Turtle Temple" by Boptimus Prime.
  • The stone people are beginning to rise again.

Update v8.10[]

March 12th 2019

  • The building in Tilted Towers almost finished construction.
  • The Bunker House in Snobby Shores was taken over by vikings.
  • The Uncle Pete's Pizza Pit restaurant in Retail Row was expanded. It has now more seating and the basketball court is gone.
  • The Stone Man and Stone Lady have fully rebuilt themselves and they seem to be looking for each other.
  • The Block was changed to "Skull Island" by Prudiz.

March 13th 2019

  • |A helicopter has appeared on the northeastern edge of Hot Springs.

March 15th 2019

  • The helicopter has moved to a hill north of Lonely Lodge.

March 16th 2019

  • The helicopter has moved to a hill south of the Race Track.

March 18th 2019

  • The helicopter has moved to a hill south of the Junkyard.

Update v8.11[]

March 20th 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Harmony Hotel" by TTV Dabbing.
  • A large truck at Tilted Towers is emptying out furniture, next to the nearly finished building.
  • The stone man and Lady statues have started walking.
  • The helicopter has moved to a hill southwest of Trucker's Oasis.

March 21st 2019

  • The helicopter has moved to a peak southeast of Happy Hamlet.

March 24th 2019

  • The helicopter has moved to a peak in between the submarine and the house next to it.

March 26th 2019

  • The helicopter has moved to Viking Village.

Update v8.20[]

March 27th 2019

  • The new Tilted Towers building has finished construction. It appears to be an insurance agency named No Sweat Insurance.
    • Cardboard models of the Meteor, The Rocket from Season 4, Kevin the Cube, the Volcano and the city can be seen in the first floor of the building.
  • The Durrr Burger restaurant in Retail Row now has a second floor.
  • Snowy Race Track was added near Happy Hamlet.
  • The Block was changed to "Tropical Treetops" by GingerJay91.
  • The Blue House in Snobby Shores was taken over by vikings.
  • Two black trucks transporting three small excavators arrived at a green flat by Green Steel Bridge.

March 28th 2019

  • Digsite Alpha appeared near Green Steel Bridge.
    • It was up to the players to destroy the rocks. Each rock had several million health points.
  • The helicopter has moved to a hill west of Pleasant Park.

March 29th 2019

  • All of the rocks were destroyed by the players.
    • The excavation revealed a volcano vent, a fossil and a car wreck.
  • The helicopter has moved to eastern edge of a mountain northeast of Pleasant Park.

March 31st 2019

  • The helicopter has moved to the hill between Loot Lake and Lazy Lagoon.

April 2nd 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Mysterious Mansion" by FurryNenja.
    • It was quickly replaced by the previous creation.
  • Digsite Beta appeared inside of Dusty Divot's main building.
    • It was up to the players to destroy the rocks. Each rock had several million health points.
  • The helicopter has landed on the hill west of Dusty Divot.

April 3rd 2019

  • All of the rocks were destroyed by the players.
    • The excavation revealed 10 chests that were quickly covered by lava.

April 4th 2019

  • The helicopter has moved to the hill by the northwest edge of Tilted Towers.

April 5th 2019

  • Digsite Gamma appeared near Loot Lake.
    • It was up to the players to destroy the rocks. Each rock had several million health points.

April 7th 2019

  • All of the rocks were destroyed by the players.
    • The excavation revealed a moai statue and the roof of The Vault.
  • The helicopter has moved to the hill between Pleasant Park and Loot Lake.

April 9th 2019

  • The helicopter has landed on one of the islands on Loot Lake.

Update v8.30[]

April 10th 2019

  • Reboot Vans were added to all Named Locations.
  • The Block was changed to "Llama Sphinx" by Prudiz.
  • The Modern House in Snobby Shores was taken over by vikings.
  • The Stone Lady is now swimming in the lava river.
  • More excavators and trucks have appeared near Loot Lake.
  • Uncle Pete's Pizza Pit now has another floor. Now with even more indoor space and a newly added Tomatohead mascot at the top.

April 12th 2019

  • Excavators are starting to head towards Loot Lake.

April 15th 2019

  • All the excavators have surrounded the Loot Lake middle island.

Update v8.40[]

April 17th 2019

  • The central part of Loot Lake was dug out. The excavators have revealed The Vault. Several watchtowers and research facilities were constructed around it by The Government.
  • The Durrr Burger restaurant in Retail Row was expanded. The burger mascot has appeared at the top of the restaurant.
  • The Brick House in Snobby Shores was taken over by vikings.
    • The Truck House was fortified to prevent another takeover.
  • The Block was changed to "Cordial Courtyard" by GonzoTheWizard.
  • 3 Bunkers were added to houses around the Island.
    • 2 in Pleasant Park and 1 in Retail Row.
  • The Stone Man is climbing down into the lava river, while the Stone Lady seems to be calling for him.
  • Durrr Phone and Pizza Phone were added.

April 18th 2019

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.

April 19th 2019

  • A floating rune appeared near Lucky Temple.
    • It could be damaged, but when brought down to 0 health it would move.

April 21st 2019

  • The first rune has entered The Vault, causing the steam to come out of the Volcano.
    • The build-up to The Unvaulting Event has begun.
    • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.

April 22nd 2019

  • The second rune appeared above The Vault.
  • Lasers related to the rune appeared in 3 places around the Island:
    • On top of the Volcano
    • Under Tree of Life
    • Northwest of Pleasant Park.
  • They can be hit to direct the lasers toward the rune.

April 23rd 2019

  • The second rune has entered The Vault. The steam emmiting from the Volcano became darker, turning into smoke with the bottom part of it being the color of the lava.
    • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.

Update v8.50[]

April 25th 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Tricky Tracks" by CallumStewart.
  • Another bunker was added in Salty Springs.
  • The Stone Man is now swimming in the lava river, and is holding a flower for the Stone Lady.
  • One of The Government setups in Loot Lake now has a chalkboard in it, which displays a possible theory that the hatch is a vault of some sort.
    • 6 screens were also added.
  • Another vault rune smashed through the wall behind the DJ booth in Yonder Yard, causing it to collapse.
    • Later that day, the third rune has entered The Vault. The smoke gets higher into the sky, making it much more noticeable with the smoke cloud at the top being wider in size. The top of the Volcano is giving out a red glow.

April 26th 2019

  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows a Bouncer.

April 28th 2019

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.
  • Later that day, the fourth rune appeared on the hill east of Tilted Towers, there are 9 squared tiles below the rune.
    • Hour later it entered The Vault. The smoke turned much darker and even higher than before. The top of the smoke starts to spread out, having the appearance of a tornado. The bottom of the smoke now looks like lava.

April 30th 2019

  • An orange hologram appeared above one of The Vault rune slots.
  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows a Drum Gun.

April 31st 2019

  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows a X-4 Stormwing.

May 1st 2019

  • The Stone Couple is now sitting together on the edge.
  • The Volcano spurts bursts of lava into the sky while the ground trembles the closer the player is to it. Rumbling can be heard erratically.
    • The fifth rune has appeared above it, there is a bar on the symbol; drop materials and ammo in to fill it up.
  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows a Tactical Submachine Gun.
6 screens for 6 vaulted items

Update v8.51[]

May 2nd 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Alien Sanctuary" by Pr0Spartaner.
  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows a Grappler.

May 3rd 2019

  • One of the Loot Lake screens now shows the Infinity Blade.
  • The fifth and final rune has entered The Vault, causing the smoke to rise up even more. The Volcano is now also more erratically spewing out lava and rumbling.
    • A 24 hour countdown timer has appeared above The Vault.
  • The smoke from the Volcano is now rising up more, and is more red. The volcano is now also more erratically spewing out lava and rumbling.

The Unvaulting Event[]

  • The countdown above Loot Lake expired, The Vault has opened, sending players back to The In-Between. Soon after players chose their winner and exited the realm, the smoke from the Volcano had covered the sky and soon began to erupt.
  • 3 locations were damaged by the eruption:
    • All of Tilted Towers was heavily destroyed, except for the No Sweat Insurance building.
    • The shopping area of Retail Row was damaged, mainly the shops and the Durrr Burger and Uncle Pete restaurants.
    • Polar Peak started cracking.
Eruption
Destruction

Update v9.00[]

May 9th 2019

  • Tilted Towers and Retail Row were rebuilt into Neo Tilted and Mega Mall.
  • The Government has set up new facilities at the Volcano and turned it into Pressure Plant.
  • The Vault was turned into a power source for Neo Tilted. Grass and trees have grown in the dug-up area.
    • The Factories were upgraded by The Government.
  • Spawn Island was updated to match the futuristic theme.
  • Hovercrafts with slipstreams appeared across the map.
  • A long trail of slipstreams was added around the map.
  • The Block was changed to "Maka's Modern Mansion" by MakaMakes_YT.
  • Damaged remains of the old clock tower from Tilted Towers and other broken things appeared at Junk Junction.
  • Most of the Pirate Camps was removed. Only 3 remained.
  • Most of the volcano vents disappeared besides the ones near Pressure Plant.
  • Blimps can be seen flying in the sky above Neo Tilted, Mega Mall and Spawn Island.
  • Wind Turbines were added on many hills in the Boreal Forest biome.
  • Wooden Fish statue was added to Hot Springs.
  • The shack on the hill south of Mega Mall was renovated.
  • The farm south of Paradise Palms was changed into a villa.
  • The repairing of Hut Watch continued.
  • Truckasaurus is now made out of new neo cars.
  • The first two digsites have been abandoned by The Government. The one near Loot Lake has a watchtower built around it.
  • The stone man and lady statues have seemingly disappeared.
  • Wooden Rabbit north from Snobby Shores was removed.
  • A giant fish trophy has fallen through the roof of a house between Dusty Divot and Mega Mall.

Update v9.01[]

May 15th 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Custom Car Carpet" by Rallred84.
  • TV with the jumping llama appeared in a house near Snobby Shores.

Update v9.10[]

May 22nd 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Swash-buckling Seas" by TheBoneRattler.
  • Polar Peak has cracked even more, and strange noises can be heard from inside. Ice dust is also coming out of it occasionally.
  • Some cars and trucks carrying destroyed items are heading towards Junk Junction.
  • Giant Sled was replaced by Giant Spaceship.
  • A house north of Snobby Shores was expanded and taken over by Pizza Pit fanatics.
  • A farm with the Stone Man and Stone Lady statues, as well as a baby, was added northeast of Lonely Lodge. The stone man is growing flowers.
  • The TV appeared in the Neo Tilted Durrr Burger Restaurant.
    • Bouncing noises are coming from it.
  • Some of the tiles in the Dance Club have turned off, and only turn back on when walked on.
  • The northern lights have moved away from the Iceberg biome.

May 28th 2019

  • The Block was changed to "Salty Scorpion" by Josh822382.
  • An eye has appeared inside of the iceberg. If a player gets close to it, its pupil will enlarge and it will stare at the player.
  • The stone child has wandered away from its parents, and he found a stone dog.

June 5th 2019

  • The Stone Family have seemingly disappeared.

Update v9.20[]

June 6th 2019

  • Polar Peak finally collapsed and The Devourer escaped, taking the castle with it and leaving a trail of footprints behind.
  • Hut Watch now has a second floor.
  • The Block was changed to "Firebase Omega" by DrDoofenschmerz.
  • The Stone Couple have returned to the farm, while the stone child is playing around. The stone dog is also now hiding behind a tree.

June 9th 2019

  • A chunk of ice carrying the Polar Peak castle can occasionally be seen bobbing in the ocean before sinking back in.

Update v9.21[]

June 12th 2019

  • The Truck House in Snobby Shores was crushed by The Devourer.
  • The Stone Couple continue working on their farm, while the stone child is playing on a hill.
  • The Block was changed to "Mythical Mayhem" by TeamFusion.

June 16th 2019

  • The Modern House in Pleasant Park was crushed by The Devourer.

Update v9.30[]

June 18th 2019

  • Loot Lake factories were damaged by The Devourer. The power cable connected to Neo Tilted was also damaged, and has electrical sparks coming out of it.
  • Solar panels were added on a hill between Paradise Palms and Manor.
  • "Looming Llama" by Stormhawk was brought back to The Block.
  • Hut Watch now has a third floor and some stairs.
  • The Stone Couple are still working in the farm, while the child is doing a cartwheel and the dog is climbing a tree.
  • Snow Cones Food Trucks appeared in many places around the Island:
    • Dusty Divot
    • Loot Lake
    • Near Lazy Lagoon
    • Near Neo Tilted
    • Small oasis near Green Steel Bridge
    • Oasis near The Birthplace
  • Giant Umbrellas appeared in 6 places around the Island:
    • Paradise Palms
    • Near Hilltop House
    • Near Lonely Lodge
    • Dusty Mountain
    • Lazy Lagoon
    • Former corrupted zone near Pleasant Park

June 25th 2019

  • Pressure Plant was upgraded into a "Robot Factory".
  • The stone man and woman are relaxing at their farm, while the child is exploring more.
  • "Harmony Hotel" by TTV Dabbing was brought back to The Block.
  • A giant rubber ducky appeared on the river near Lucky Landing.
    • Over the days it would make its way towards Loot Lake.

July 2nd 2019

  • The construction of a mech at Pressure Plant has began. The feet and one part of its right leg were built.
  • The Stone Couple are worried about their child, who is playing on a mountain near the stone dog.
  • "Tricky Tracks" by CallumStewart was brought back to The Block.
  • Edible Ice Cream can now be found in Mega Mall.

July 3rd 2019

  • Many portals from Stranger Things appeared in Mega Mall.

July 4th 2019

  • Construction of the Pressure Plant mech continued. Second part of its right leg and first part of its left leg were built.

July 6th 2019

  • Construction of the Pressure Plant mech continued. Second part of its left leg were built.
  • Propaganda posters and holographic warnings appeared in Neo Tilted, Mega Mall and Pressure Plant.

July 8th 2019

  • The giant rubber ducky reached Loot Lake.
  • Construction of the Pressure Plant mech continued. Its torso is now fully built.

July 9th 2019

  • "Omega Pyramid" by Directingpete was brought back to The Block.
  • The Stone Couple are still worried about their child, and the stone woman is calling out to him. Meanwhile, the stone child is climbing down a cliff while the stone dog has spotted him.
  • The Stranger Things portals in Mega Mall were removed.

July 10th 2019

  • The left bicep of the robot at Pressure Plant has been built.

July 12th 2019

  • The Pressure Plant mech's right arm construction was completed.

July 13th 2019

  • A 7-day countdown timer appeared above all of the Sky Platforms.

July 14th 2019

  • The Pressure Plant mech's left arm construction was completed. A jetpack was built on its back.
  • The monster carrying the Polar Peak castle can be seen much more frequently and moves much faster. The whole map also trembles whenever it appears.

Update v9.40[]

July 17th 2019

  • The construction of the mech at Pressure Plant was finished, complete with a head and several different colors and styles corresponding to Singularity's styles.
  • Hut Watch now has a fourth floor.
  • "Cordial Courtyard" by GonzoTheWizard was brought back to The Block.
  • All of the 14 Days of Summer props and items across the map are now gone.
  • The stone child is now falling off of the cliff and the stone dog is trying to pull him back up. The Stone Couple seem scared.

The Final Showdown[]

  • The countdown expired and a battle between Mecha Team Leader and The Devourer played out, resulting in The Devourer's death.
    • The Vault was severely damaged and forcefully opened by the Mech and cracked Zero Point is hovering above it.
    • The Pirate Camp northwest of Lazy Lagoon was destroyed by The Devourer.
    • Statue of Singularity in Neo Tilted was pulled out of the fountain.
    • The Devourer's remains can be found near Salty Springs.

Update v9.41[]

July 24th 2019

  • The Zero Point turned slightly red. Rift sounds can be heard around it.
  • "Llama Sphinx" by Prudiz was brought back to The Block.
  • The stone child has been pulled up by the stone dog, and he is now petting it. Meanwhile, the stone man and woman seem relieved and they are holding hands.
  • The cracks from the earthquakes back in Season 7 have disappeared.

July 25th 2019

  • The Zero Point is now slightly purple, and has a blue aura around it.
  • Many birthday decorations have appeared in 10 different places across the map:
    • Junk Junction
    • Pleasant Park
    • Loot Lake
    • Shifty Shafts
    • Viking Village
    • Salty Springs
    • Fatal Fields
    • Lonely Lodge
    • Paradise Palms
    • Race Track

July 27th 2019

  • The Zero Point got brighter and is making strange heartbeat or clock noises. More particles is also coming off it.

July 29th 2019

  • The Zero Point become very bright and has more particles coming out of it. There is also a lot of light coming out of it.

July 30th 2019

  • The Zero Point is now pulsing and emitting a lot of very fast string-like particles. It is also extremely bright and flashing.

July 31st 2019

  • With the conclusion of the 2nd Birthday event, the large birthday cakes are now gone, although the smaller edible ones remain.

Update v10.00[]

August 1st 2019

  • Time around The Zero Point froze, creating an anti-gravity bubble with floating objects everywhere around it. Strange noises can be heard when inside it.
  • Dusty Depot and Factory have returned due to a reality wave, replacing Dusty Divot and Dusty Diner.
    • The Meteor has also returned as Frozen Meteor.
  • The Loot Lake power cable is no longer active.
  • Some of the ground and trees surrounding Monster's Remains have turned a pink color.
  • The Block was changed to a Block by W4term2lon.
  • All of the Sky Platforms, wind turbines, propaganda posters and blimps in the sky were removed.
  • The Stone Family has disappeared again.
  • Most of the Slipstreams have been removed, apart from the ones surrounding Neo Tilted and Mega Mall.
  • A shack south of Paradise Palms near The Birthplace has started growing strange roots similar to the ones seen in the Corrupted Areas from Season 6.
  • The Welcome sign at Paradise Palms now has Moisty Mire trees in its background.
  • The red house at the Pueblo that used to be filled with chairs is now filled with TVs instead.
  • One of the mini little castles south from Polar Peak now has a couple of toilets and pipes on it, these are the same ones from Flush Factory.
  • A mini movie screen and a "Drive-In Theatre" sign has appeared east of Sunny Steps.
  • All of the volcano vents have stopped working.
  • A golf club house has appeared near Lazy Lagoon.
  • The Giant Spaceship was turned back into the Giant Chair from pre-Season 7.
  • The battle bus that crashed north of Loot Lake during Fortnitemares 2018 has turned into a crashed RV.
  • Hut Watch now has more stairs and work done on the walls and roofs.
  • One of the arms of the Truckasaurus has fallen off, and it is holding a pole and raising it in the air. It is a reference to Mecha Team Leader in The Final Showdown.
  • A giant teddy bear has appeared in a shack west of Paradise Palms.
  • A garage with gnomes on top of and inside the building has been added on a hill west of Pleasant Park.
  • Half of a tower just south of Lucky Landing has turned into a wooden shack.
  • The stuff inside a hut south-west of Pleasant Park has gone upside down.
  • A statue of Stoneheart was added to Haunted Hills.
  • Spawn Island became a combination of previous versions.

August 2nd 2019

  • A telescope has appeared on top of the northern warehouse at Dusty Depot and it is facing towards the Frozen Meteor.

August 4th 2019

  • A small laboratory and chalkboard has been added inside the grey warehouse of Dusty Depot.
  • A rift beacon is being constructed in Neo Tilted.

August 5th 2019

  • The rift beacon at Neo Tilted was activated and created a small rift above the POI.

August 6th 2019

  • The rift beacon at Neo Tilted created a Rift Zone around the POI, turning it into a called Tilted Town. Building and destroying objects is not allowed in Tilted Town.
    • The slipstream around the area has been removed, leaving the one around Mega Mall the only one left.
  • The Block was changed to "Dome Town" by Okyt.
  • The exterior of the grey warehouse at Dusty Depot, as well as the interior has been updated.

August 8th 2019

  • Another satellite was added on the Dusty Depot grey warehouse, and the inside has been updated with a second floor and more computers.

August 11th 2019

  • A rift beacon is being constructed at Mega Mall.

August 12th 2019

  • The rift beacon at Mega Mall has been activated, and a small rift has been opened in the sky above the POI.

Update v10.10[]

August 14th 2019

  • The rift beacon at Mega Mall created a Rift Zone around the POI, turning it into pre-Season 7 Retail Row that is infested with Cube Monsters.
  • The Block was changed to a Block by BobbyMcSwanson.
  • A wrecked building with floating chests in it appeared inside Loot Lake. The interior looks like one of The Government labs from late Season 8.
  • The grey warehouse at Dusty Depot was updated again, and more work was done inside. Few monitors with Visitor symbols was also added.
  • Two memorial stones for the Cube have appeared on the Island. One is on the desert mountain where it was formed, and the other is at Loot Lake.
  • A trophy appeared in Lucky Landing with the name of Bugha, the Solo World Cup Winner, on it.
  • A trophy appeared in Happy Hamlet with the names of the World Cup Duos winners on it.

August 15th 2019

  • A rift beacon is being constructed at the Sports Center.

August 19th 2019

  • The rift beacon at the Sports Center was activated and created a small rift above the POI.

August 20th 2019

  • The rift beacon at the Sports Center malfunctioned and exploded, causing the rift above it to disappear and destroying the POI. A small Crater with some remains of the Stadium was left behind.
  • The Block was changed to "Magmatic Metallurgy" by Feraldragon.

August 22nd 2019

  • A rift beacon is being constructed in the desert, southwest of Paradise Palms.

August 26th 2019

  • The rift beacon in the desert activated and opened a small rift above it.

Update v10.20[]

August 27th 2019

  • The rift beacon in the desert created a Rift Zone surrounding a large portion of the desert, creating Pandora.
    • Pueblo and Trucker's Oasis were replaced in the process.
  • The Block was changed to a Block by FIVEWALNUT.
  • The grey warehouse of Dusty Depot has been updated yet again. Pieces from the B.R.U.T.E mech as well as some other things can be found inside.
  • A dance floor and disco lights were added into the westmostern hangar of Frosty Flights for a quest.
  • Frozen Meteor started to gain small cracks.
  • Hut Watch now has a roof installed and more work has been done on the exterior.
  • Hilltop House now has Carbide and Omega posters in it.
  • Ladders to the top of hills were added in Tilted Town for easier access.

August 29th 2019

  • A rift beacon is being constructed at Fatal Fields.

September 2nd 2019

  • The rift beacon at Fatal Fields activated and opened a small rift above the location.

September 3rd 2019

  • The Floating Island from Season 6 has re-appeared just northwest of Fatal Fields. Additionally, the Motel, noms sign and Durrr Burger head near Pleasant Park have appeared on the island.
  • The grey warehouse of Dusty Depot has been slightly updated again, the B.R.U.T.E pieces has been disassembled and some trucks appeared outside it.
  • The Block was changed to a Block by EagleBro277.
  • Red balloons have appeared in Paradise Palms, Retail Row and Pleasant Park near sewers. When popped, a creepy laugh can be heard.

September 5th 2019

  • Under construction rift beacons appeared at Paradise Palms and the Frozen Lake.
  • The Floating Island has moved to above the Outskirts.

September 6th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved to just northwest of Happy Hamlet.

September 8th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved south of Frosty Flights.

September 9th 2019

  • The red balloons were removed.
  • The rift beacons at Paradise Palms and the Frozen Lake activated, and small rifts opened above the two POIs.
  • The Floating Island has moved right above Frosty Flights.

September 10th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved northeast of Frosty Flights and southwest of the frozen lake.

Update v10.30[]

September 11th 2019

  • The rift beacon at Paradise Palms created a Rift Zone around the area, converting it into a mix of Paradise Palms and Moisty Mire called Moisty Palms.
    • Crouching causes a transformation into a prop.
  • Prison and Convenience Store have also returned.
  • The rift beacon at the Frozen Lake also created a Rift Zone around the POI, causing Greasy Grove to return.
    • Durrr Burger Restaurant was replaced by a TACOS one, all the houses changed positions and colors and occassionally tacos fall from the sky causing everyone to do Taco Time.
  • The grey warehouse at Dusty Depot has been significantly updated. The roof has opened and something is being constructed inside of it.
  • Pandora was removed, causing Pueblo and Trucker's Oasis to return.
  • The Block was changed to a Block by MrSIickWillyz.
  • The Floating Island has moved northwest of Greasy Grove.
Greasy Grove
Moisty Palms
Rocket Stage 1

September 12th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved east of the Viking Village and west of the Destroyed Sports Center.

September 13th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved east of Snobby Shores and north of the Viking Village.
  • A few thrusters can be seen lying on the floor of the grey Dusty Depot warehouse.

September 14th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved north of Snobby Shores and northwest of Villain Lair.

September 15th 2019

  • A rocket booster was constructed in the grey warehouse of Dusty Depot.
Rocket Stage 2

September 16th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved just outside of Haunted Hills.

September 17th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved northwest of Pleasant Park and near Haunted Hills.
  • More of the rocket in the Dusty Depot grey warehouse has been constructed.
Rocket Stage 3

Update v10.31[]

September 18th 2019

  • A rift beacon is being constructed at Tilted Town.
  • The Block was changed to a Block by LEGENDARY-CHUAN-QI.
  • The ice cream truck has fallen off the bridge on the hill west of Fatal Fields.
  • The Floating Island has moved east of Junk Junction.

September 19th 2019

  • The shaft of The Rocket in the grey warehouse has been constructed.
  • The Floating Island has moved very close to The Block.
  • The rift beacon at Tilted Town activated. A small batarang can also be seen in a hay pile near the beacon.

September 20th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved east of The Block.

September 21st 2019

  • Tilted Town was replaced by Gotham City.
  • The Floating Island has moved northwest of Lazy Lagoon.
  • The Rocket in the grey warehouse has almost been completed.
Gotham City

September 22nd 2019

  • A rift beacon is being constructed east of Junk Junction and south of the Depot Race Track.

September 23rd 2019

  • The rift beacon near the Depot Race Track activated and opened a small rift above the area.

Update v10.40[]

September 25th 2019

  • The rift beacon near the Depot Race Track created a Rift Zone around the area, bringing Starry Suburbs to the Island.
    • Small stars containing loot occasionally fall in there.
  • The Depot Race Track starting lights have tilted forward, now saying "Coming Soon".
  • The Block was changed to a Pandora Themed Block by Sunday.
  • The Floating Island moved just outside of Pressure Plant.
  • A shack is being constructed at the Destroyed Sports Center.
  • Hut Watch was completed and painted brown. It appears to be a watchtower.
  • The grey warehouse in Dusty Depot has been updated once again. All of the monitors seem to have infected B.R.U.T.E.s on them, and laser pointers were added to the rocket.
Starry Suburbs
Rocket Stage 7

September 26th 2019

  • The Rocket is now fully complete with the lasers now being added on.

September 27th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved east of Pressure Plant.

September 28th 2019

  • Wires were added to the rocket at Dusty Depot.
  • The Floating Island has moved to Lonely Lodge.

September 29th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved south from Lonely Lodge.

September 30th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved south over the Race Track.

October 1st 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved south slightly into Moisty Palms.

Update v10.41[]

October 2nd 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved east of Moisty Palms.

October 4th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved south of Moisty Palms.

October 5th 2019

  • An eight-day countdown has appeared above The Rocket at Dusty Depot and on TVs across the map.
  • The Zero Point has started making strange, clock-like ticking noises.

October 8th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved west of Pueblo.

October 10th 2019

  • Sirens can now be heard every minute, similar to the ones at the Villain Lair in Season 4 before the initial Rocket Launch.
Countdown

October 12th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved south of Fatal Fields.

October 13th 2019

  • The Floating Island has moved to the southwest of Fatal Fields. It has nearly reached it's starting point.

The End[]

  • The Rocket was launched once again from Dusty Depot. After dropping Frozen Meteor on The Zero Point, the whole Island was sucked into The Black Hole.

Music

Music[]

Area Discovered (C4SOG & OG)
Trivia

Trivia[]

  • Athena is named after the Greek goddess of the same name; She is the goddess of strategic warfare and is also the favourite daughter of Zeus.
  • Most of the buildings on Athena was taken from Save the World.
  • Four locations from this map returned in the Chapter 2 map, Apollo, they are: Pleasant Park, Retail Row, Risky Reels and Salty Springs.
    • There are also many locations on Apollo similar to locations from Athena. These include Lazy Lake (Loot Lake & Tilted Towers), Frenzy Farm (Fatal Fields), Misty Meadows (Happy Hamlet), Compact Cars (Junk Junction), Weeping Woods (Wailing Woods), Believer Beach (Paradise Palms) and Slurpy Swamp (Moisty Mire).
  • Five locations returned on the Chapter 3 map, Artemis. These were Greasy Grove, Shifty Shafts, Loot Lake (as a landmark), Tilted Towers, and Sunny Steps (as a landmark).
  • It is currently unknown if there was another island on the other side of Athena, like Apollo and Artemis, which would have been destroyed during the end event.
    • There likely isn't, as in Greek mythology, Apollo and Artemis are twins, while Athena doesn't have a twin.
  • On the Chapter 2 map (Apollo), the central island's outline is a scaled down version of Athena.
  • Athena is the first island to ever have returned twice after being removed.
